text.content:
Gran' Jas Onmiek Myers would tell bed time stories to us youngers. He especially loved to talk about "scary monsters jumping out of the dark ""Dropping from the ceiling ", "out of the shadows ", just anything.

Be he especially loved to chat about things called Ghouls and Ghasts. If chili had been served at the evening meal, then by the time it had percolated thru the room, he'd start talking about how the smell reminded him of the time he fought ghouls at Treehenge.

Andntil tonight, I'd thought they were just stories. Remind me to ask Porky "no chili or beans tonight, please ".

journals.name: A Shady Meeting-Part Two-Green Spotted Boogaloo

text.content:
We arrive at Duhm's Rooms, Turin's former home. It is a large Tudor framed building with multiple entrances. We go to the common area, and see a couple people down on their luck. We order drinks from the old man behind the bar. He givess a key to room 42.

We search the hall, and go to room 42. Wese the key to go into the room. It is dark inside. The room has a table and two chairs and doesn't look like it issed for much. A muscular@UUID[JournalEntry.QZ5xAxclPc5iTCYN]{human male} askss to shut the door. He seems young (twenty-ish) with shaggy long hair and very well dressed. He says he needs help with an affair of the heart. We turn on the light. On the chair is a common cloak.

"The one that I love will not have menless we can be married in a sanctified church.But we can 't do it in the city"He needs help looking for a church, and a small group to be taken there to be married. He first heard abouts when we rescued Billy. He says her family will object, his foster father might be okay, and the Young Stallions would be against it because she is from a merchant family. It would be appreciated if we can do this within a month. There is a small town (Kilwich) about 15 miles to the East that has a church that might still be sanctified.

We can leave a message with Burbas, "the finder"who hangs out near the Porpidolphus Fountain in Thieves' Market.Tell him is a message for Antonio.If he has a message for you, he will send it to the Giggling Griffon.

We return to the Griffon.Our dots are teal.There is a centaur cab parked outside.Porky rushes to greets.He says that something happened in the @UUID[JournalEntry.uHhREeXKYMxyfFOm]{City of the Dead}, a former cemetery turned into a park and the cab is from Lyza to takes.

During the ride, the centaur is going as fast as they can, going around North Caravan street, we lurch onto two wheels, and feel a familiar lurch.We come to walkingp studio lane, the park on our left.It seems calm.We see several watch members.Some seem pale, others queasy.

Just inside the front gates is a small hut and the watch sergeant.There were three members of the @UUID[JournalEntry.ueA4BEQfUX5iKhXQ]{Jackals} gang who were murdered.We go look at the morgue.There are three bodies laid out.Probably a tiefling, human, and dwarf.They have been stabbed and slashed all over.Their faces look like they have been crushed in a vice.The consensus is that they were a group of grave robbers who stumbled onto something they shouldn 't have. Martin suggests the other guards get a priest to cast gentle repose.

We go to examine the scene. Arada and Penelope try to recreate what happened. Turin looks for tracks. Turn notices a glow globe is glowing a different color, much brighter than the others. It looks like this is the end of a running battle. The prints are all shod, no animals, probably the victims.

Eugene ritual casts Detect Magic, Martin stays with him while the rest move on. There are several more blood areas ahead. The driftglobes are magic. Except for three near a large statue of a fallen warrior. Which engage in combat. One zaps Eugene. Turin shoots it and hurts it badly. The battle rages, with the Will O Wisps doing damage, and the party hitting back (turns out they are hard to hit). But we eventually prevail.

We continue to follow the blood. There is blood splatter heading into the @UUID[JournalEntry.iPnt7WOtvXE2MT01]{Gerond family mausoleum}. "What you fear, we master."Outside is a diorama of many classic monsters.

The family goes back to the founding of Haven. Ekhan Gerond was the founder of the family, maybe 5 generations back. They were monster slayers, including a red dragon. The current matriarch, Roweena is bringing the family back, especially through her role as an enchantress. The door was broken from the outside, probably by the grave robbers.

We enter the mausoleum…

We are on our own for patrol. We go to the Heights first to see if @UUID[JournalEntry.y9nknEVgST3BQ0Mb]{Kelvar} can fix Penelope' s armor.Penelope meets Kelvar, who is a Dwarf.Name dropping Lyza does wonders.Penelope shows off the rust monster damage.Kevlar thinks they could fix it, but not sure if it would be as good.But instead has a nice new suit of chain mail.It almost fits, but needs some alterations-maybe a couple hours.

Martin goes in to talk to @UUID[JournalEntry.cGJYuOOz5Doelz1t]{ Jillie }, but she isn 't in at the moment. Instead he talks to @UUID[JournalEntry.gjhg7CxtuZAP7H0j]{Pirandello}. Martin leave' s a message for Jillie.Martin also finds out the spots are yellow-green.

Turin goes to the weapon store.At some point he plans on finding a bowyer.Arada is thinking through her contacts to see if anyone knows about the spots.

Eugene goes to the healer who explains they need the right supplements.

At 7pm Penelope gets the chain armor.It will be close, but we are off to Dhoom 's Rhooms.

We have patrol near the copper gate and the Commons. We have been acting as gate guards, learning the basics of commerce. Near the end of our shift, we see a solitary figure approaching. It appears to be an old woman. We seem to recognize her as a woman who was breeding dangerous animals and got expelled. She seems to have a baby red dragon on her shoulder.

Eugene goes to talk to the Barracks captain next door. Martin, Penelope, and Arada go to the road to talk. Turin hangs back. Martin says she can' t come in without a license for her cat, or other pets into the city.She casts a curse on Martin.something something spot on head, rainbows, blah blah, you 're dead.

Coming back, Eugene notices the four ofs have orange dots on their foreheads. Eugene goes to talk to her. She curses him too. Eugene doesn' t know what the critter is, but can look itp.Another guard says something about a new curse running around and spots and such.And we should look around the thieves ' market.

Martin casts Detect Poison and Disease and finds nothing. Eugene casts detect magic, and all the spots are magic which is Abjuration. We decide to go back home to talk to Thom. Porky says Thom is down in her lab. Porky thinks there is a drink that might break the curse. We talk to Thom in the basement. Thom says it is orange. She also says she isn' t good with curses.

We change out of our guardniforms and head to the Waterlogged Rat(U08)in the commons.It gives off the vibe of a dive bar, dimly lit, dingy, smoke filled.Turin thinks he has been there once or twice.As we stand in the entrance, we get a queasy feeling and we find ourselves walking down the street towards the Waterlogged Rat.

We sit at the bar.The barkeep thinks we are in the wrong bar.We ask about the spots, and the barkeep gets freaked out.He calls over Mike the dockworker who says we are screwed.Joey says we need some of the juice to drink.A shot of owlbearrine stirred with an awakened tree branch.Eugene buys a round of drinks.The stories started a week or so ago, shortly after the ship came in.

We decide to go to the Lohisian Temple(R12).It is a nice clean white stone building.As we walk in, there is a statue of the goddess.We gop to the check in desk.There is a female half elf(Raven)and a male human.They agree to look ats.So far they are very calm.They look ats one at a time.A gentleman(Herman)walks in with a gaggle of students.Penelope goes first and tells the story.The students react.One tells about rumors on the street.The doctor does comment it seems to get yellower but we should have a couple days.

As we start walking over, Eugene passes out.The rest ofs feel a lurch and a sense of nausea.The rest ofs wakep looking out the lights of our own private rooms.Middle of the day, we are dressed.Turin sends a message to Lyza telling her what 's happening. We meet with the doctors. Shirin (an elf) is on duty. We go to a meeting room and are told the seniors will be withs soon. Herman and others come in. They tells they are going to kicks loose for the day and asks to come back tomorrow. Shirin letss out.

We go back to the Griffon

We go downstairs early evening.  Lyza tellss the mayor wants to meets early the next morning.  There are things going on, but they are trying to keep it tight.


It is too late fors to go to theniversity now or to source stuff.


Also the mages are swarming the tower by this point.

journals.name: A vigorous debate in the Council chambers

text.content:
Aside: The Haven Ironworks in in the Labyrinth (U05)


We getp the next morning and head to City Hall and the Council Chamber.


Sitting at a desk in the middle of the room is Mayor Elspeth Windermere. The air seems to vibrate and quiver. In the corner of our eyes we see shapes appear and disappear.

The tower has been here for seven days.  We explain that the tower was probably built partly in Haven.  Nobody knows of it directly.  Prof Gearhart knows a little (he’s in the archives).


We tell her about the birds and how they mentioned the mayor by name.  Also that she knew the cost and there were phantoms of paradox.  As we say that, an apparition appears.

Penelope goes to protect the mayor and Turin shoots it with an arrow.  There is a shimmer, and we seem to see a human male at the podium arguing and pointing at a council member. The person being pointed to looks like Harz DeLaRiis, a confidant of Lyza. 


Arada shakes off the vision and stabs it. Eugene and Martin protect the mayor who withdraws.  The spirit attacks Arada and Penelope finishes it off.


Eugene asks what happens in the past. The mayor says one or two come through, hurt a few people, then stop. It started about a month ago.


Eugene casts detect magic.  Martin asks about the argument. The mayor says she thinks it was in the past, and was Michael Swiftsword, pointing at Harz De la Riis. The two of them aren’t normally chummy, but that isn’tnexpected.


Eugene doesn’t see anything, but another phantom attacks him, and misses as he had foreseen. Arada shoots it with her bow and misses. Another weird shift happens. The room goes different and a new scene appears. Swiftsword is at a chair, and Harz and Lyza are at the podium. Harz seems to be congratulating her. Things shift back.  Turin shoots it but misses and Martin Sacred Flame it.


Penelope rushesp and swaps places with Eugene. Eugene blasts it with magic missile and dissolves it. He continues his detect magic search.


Martin mentions Olivia and Constantine.  The mayor thinks that Gearhart mentioned an Olivia Chronosmith.  


Turin asks about the Ironwood coal, Earthheart emerald, and Haven steel. 


Penelope notices a box of mirrors. The mayor says that they were going to be hungp in the council room.  


The mayor gets a page to takes to the archives to meet Gearhart. The page takes to the archives and tellss to gopstairs and leaves.  We gopstairs.


As we enter the halls, a windburst strikes Turin.  Martin calls out, and also hits a tornado.


We explore a bit. One of the rooms is a storeroom.  The other is Gearhart’s office

He wants to know why we are in his office.  Martin confuses him. We start discussing the tower and Constantine Chronosmith.

He thinks the tower was built in the long past.  We mention Olivia, and he recognizes the name. He thinks Olivia is the last living Chronosmith descendent.  He has a book of Constantine’s notes.


We explore a bit and find a stair leading to not this adventure.  Penelope finds an old patent tellings how to build beep beep. Eugene’s reading of the notes suggests that we need a temporal resonator. 


We look around the library and find many interesting volumes, including sketches of the tower, schematics of defense systems, principles of time magic, and blueprints for a temporal matrix. Eugene leaves some of the books with Gearhart.


Gearhart thinks Olivia might be a watchmaker.  There are a few streets where there are a lot of jewelry shops.


Martin suggests we talk to the guards in that area and see if they know of her shop.

… And then we feel a sudden lurch that makess feel totally nauseous …

We are back in the room of with the mirror.It is still covered.Our spots are light blue now.The door is closed not broken down.We ' ve gone back in time.

Aradanlocks the door and we spike it open.She goes to where the trap is.She tries to disable it.She feels and hears something break.She thinks it might be disarmed.Penelope tries to test the pressure plate with Martin ' s mace.Martin goes to test.The trap still goes off but he isnaffected.

We go into a small chamber with decorated coffins.There is another door leading on.Arada leads the way searching for traps.We find a corridor that leads to a secret door in the workshop.We go to the two doors in the main corridor we didn ' t open before.

It is a small room, with a fancy sword on top of an altar.Behind the altar is a suit of armor.It is a chapel dedicated to Mandos.Martin looks for blood on the armor and sword and finds none.Eugene casts Detect Magic to look for magic.The armor is magical, the altar is not, the sword is.Nothing else in the room is(other than the wall sconces-continual flame).

We go back outside.There is a crowd gathered.It is getting towards twilight and about 5: 30 am.Sergeant Brell.We should tell the Geronde family.We decide to go to the GG to get Thom to patchp Arada and then go to the Heights.

We find Thom in her lab and she tellss to take Aradapstairs.Work mode Thom interrogates her.She looks at the wound, mutters to herself, and goes to her room to get a potion and tells Arada to drink it.Arada drinks it and feels godawful and throwsp.She tells Arada to take it easy for the rest of the day or things could not go well.

We ask Mrs Clever if she has any to go food.She moderately ascerbically givess some apples and bread and Arada a much of coffee maybe ?

We go to the Heights and go to the Geronde residence.(I21 on the map).There is an ornate entrance.We go to the front door.We meet a teenaged girl sneaking out.She introduces herself as Adrienne.We ask to speak to her parents.She tellss her grandma is home.She letss inside and goes to get the grandmother.

Grandmother comes down and is lady Roweena Geronde.We gave her the book.We gave her a summary of what happened.She is more concerned with information containment.Martin tries to calm her down.She tellss to never talk about this to anyone.

We go to the hospital.Our spots are now violet.The folk there arenable to helps.They are praying for divine help, and hope we are able to take advantage when it comes.

We decide to go back to the GG and get some rest and drink together.

As we take a long rest we levelp and are now third level.

When we wakep, our spots are black.

We give Lyza the full debrief.

  • Spots

  • Mausoleum and Geronde family

  • Young noble and marrying

  • Black Hand

Lyza mentions she thinks Arada may know what is going on and that Arada stole something from Lady Karilinia Inturisdan who is in the Circle Chamber.

She also wipes the spot off our face with a hanky.

She is afraid of a Thieves guild war in town.She also wantss to play along with Antonio for now.

Eugene identifies the two things we had found that were magical.

  • The rock is a + 1 stone of protection

  • The gloves are2026 to be determined

journals.name: Ah, that ' s where the kobolds went

text.content:
The night passes and the next morning we ready ourselves to go home.


On the ride home, Turin who was in front notices in the distance a group of creatures that look like kobolds. They are near what looks like a demoncorn. 


We sneak into position, and Turin launches a Hail of Thorns. It does significant damage to the group of the kobolds, killing several.  Martin creates a spiritual weapon killing another.


The boss misses Martin with a bow shot, as Eugene had foreseen. Thendeadnicorn flees, and a hidden kobold hits Penelope. Arada dispatches it with extreme lethality. Penelope rushesp. Several kobolds hit her with their slings, but she kills one in retribution. Eugeneses a magic missile to kill two more. Six seconds in and we’ve managed toneven the odds.


Turin kills the boss kobold and hears a voice in his head “Now would be a good time”. An arrow out of nowhere kills another kobold. 


Martin heals Penelope and Arada sticks the one with her rapier, hitting it in the “explode here” spot. The last two kobolds make a valiant stand, that is very ineffective. Eugene sleeps the last one so we can interrogate it.


The kobolds had crap on them, except for the boss who had a scimitar, javelin, chain shirt, and shield. I.e. slightly better crap.


Martin heals Arada and Penelope as we interrogate the kobold.

As we look around, we see five people in cages. We recognize Seraphina, Olivia, Marita, Agatha, and someone we don’t recognize. They don’t know where the keys are kept, but fortunately we have an Arada.

As Arada opens cages, Eugene searches the bodies. 

The other person is a young boy. He is very eager and thankful. He grovels ats being big damn heroes. His name is Torik.


He says he’s been here a few days. He says there has been a parade of people coming in and out. He comes from a fishing village down the coast (Valtalar which is also where Turin is from) and stowed away on a sailing boat. Turin takes an interest. His parents were Frederick and Martha who ran a small general store. Turin didn’t know them well, but knew they had a boy.

Torik met some “friends” when he got to Haven only they jumped him, and put a bag on his head. He offers to be our house boy. 

We also notice a second set of stairs goingp.  Which is a thing for after we get the captives to safety. We also find a black hand. 

Olivia pipesp that she thinks the tower wantss to helps fix it.

We decide to take the captives to the Griffon and dispatch runners to their houses to get them. We also ask if any of them know why they were taken. Olivia and Seraphina think it has to do with the tower. Agatha and Marita have no idea but were taken separately.

Penelope’s “girlfriend”pstairs says the rest of the clerks ran away. We ask her to voluntarily come withs. Eugene and Arada checkpstairs but everyone is gone. We also learn Ardielle is a sponsor of thenofficial watch in the Outlands (which is where most of the other races live.)

Martin goes to the nearby guard station to get a couple Watch to stand guard while the rest go back to the Griffon.

At the Griffon, Porky wants to know what is going on.  When we explain, he gets the staff to help. He sends Alene to get Thom.

Arada reads the book she got from the basement. She is able to pick out some notes from the last week with corresponding dates:

7-Clear out for the 10th

9-Boy. Left over from last set (lot 32)

10-Two women-worse for wear (Olivia and Seraphina)

     - woman (Marita)

11-Woman (Agatha, Marita’s friend)

       Owner would have freaked out (we know she was confused about this set of people downstairs)

Also we know:

12th-Thieves’ guild tries to break in and realized the store wasn’t as expected

13th-We rescue the women (and boy) 

Eugene conducts a communal interview. 

Torik was the first there and was brought in with several others who were taken away after a day. Then Olivia and Seraphina together, then Marita, then Agatha.

Janie says she has been working at the shop for several months, most days. She had found the trap door a bit ago and thought it was odd. She hadn’t seen anyone coming or going.

We killed six bandits. They think there were four to ten more who all came and went. The leader we killed was the boss we think.  There was a tiefling and a dwarf and at least one woman.

We also check where they got captured from. The one name we get from them is they heard someone mention someone named “Angel”

Eventually they all sign the document (Torik marks an X)

Georgio arrives to get Marita (we also spy Antonio who is not being subtle). They take Marita and Agatha home.

Meanwhile Martin gets a few guards. He also shows the sergeant the basement and they discuss Adrielle and how if someone was running a slave ring then having an independent guard would be a good thing.

Janie givess an address near the docks. Olivia and Seraphina decide to stay at the Griffon for a day or two.

We take a short rest and Arada finishes the book. She finds the boy is the last of “Lot 32” and they had to get rid of some people to make room for some “special orders” (Marita and Agatha). Olivia and Seraphina were throw ins.

Also the thieves' guild is cranky with the Black Hand.

Arada and Penelope go to talk with some of her old friends, and Turin, Eugene, and Martin go to the store.00a0 They take Torik because why not.

At the store, the sergeant is there and there are guards at the front and back.We go to the basement, with the sergeant and Torik in tow.

The stairs lead down and there is a twisty passageway.00a0 There is a pile of brush and shrubs.00a0 Outside we hear the sound of the river.Turin opens the entrance.We come out on the riverbank justpriver of the shop.It looks like long ago this was a legitimate place to tiep a boat.We can tell it has beensed for that more often.It definitely looks like this is intended as a hidden entrance.During the day you probably couldn2019t find itnless you were looking for it.00a0

We decide to hide and see if anyone comes.Getting a couple live captives would be nice.

In another part of town, Arada takes Penelope to the guild house.They go to the Blue Moon Tavern.The barkeepsed to be activentil he aged out of the business and now runs the bar.

Arada chatsp the barkeep and tells him she wants to talk to someone about new events with the Hand.He goes to find a muckity muck

He says Arquephus(Keeper of Records and the right hand of the guildmaster)wants to talk.Penelope comes with her.She tells him that the Hand has been running a trafficking ring and shows him the log book.She tells him the special package was two wealthy people in the Heights.The Keeper is concerned.

She speculates the Hand has beensing the owner of Fine Silks and Fabrics as a stooge.There is a reference to the Speedy Blade special commission.(Speedy Blade is totally not Swiftsword).00a0 Arada lets it slip that Swiftsword might be the head of the Black Hand2026.00a0

Back on the river bank, Torik is bored.00a0 Turin tells him he can go play in the Plaza.Martin gets him a rock for tracking purposes.

At the Thieve2019s Guild, they ask Arada what the Irregular2019s plans are.00a0

1)Make sure the slave run stays shut down.00a000a0

2)Ask for the Guild2019s help watching to see anynusual boat traffic.

Arada and Penelope go back to the store and decide to follow to see where we went.Turin hears a noise from the tunnel and notches an arrow.Turin sees a light in the tunnel.Arada and Penelope sees something outside the tunnel.Eugene and Turin who have darkvision recognize them.Crisis averted.

We compare notes.Especially the Swiftsword conjecture.We would have expected a shift change by now.We decide to go back to the Griffon and talk to some of the nobles in the morning.We have decently good connections with three noble families and at least one merchant family.

As we go to grab Torik, he has gone wandering, probably into the woods.Turin and Eugene try to locate him through tracking and magic.He went into Erenhir which is known to be off limits-ish.It is also 2-2: 30 in the morning.00a0 Martin and Turin decide to crash at the local barracks to pickp the search in the morning.

Martin asks the ex werewolves if any of them have family in town.00a0 They all say no.Most are travellers who got beset on the road.

Eugene tries to see if he can identify patient zero.00a0 They aren2019t sure, but they think it was a couple who aren2019t here.He asks if there was a sub pack or not, but they think the curse linked them together.He also asks if they remember the/u201cmayor2019s/u201d son.They say no.

We head to the temple to talk to them about shelter for the survivors.We have a group conversation if they are still a danger or not.00a0 Probably not.Probably.

We meet a human female cleric and tell her we2019ve broken the curse.00a0 She is apprehensive but invitess all in.00a0 She tellss there are a couple hot heads.00a0 She also suggests that we should have guards at all the doors.Just in case .00a0 She also says she2019ll arrange for food.

The survivors say they will just sleep.00a0 Penelope falls asleep against a pew.00a0 Arada leans against Penelope and keeps an eye on the door and the ex werewolves.Once the head cleric returns, we2019ll lock the doors.00a0 Turin will sleep by the back door.Our planned watch order is Eugene early, Martin middle, and Arada dawn.00a0

The priestess comes back with some blankets, bedding, and has arranged for some food to be delivered.00a0 She explained they had somenexpected guests who were down on their luck.

The first watch goes okay.In the middle of the night, Martin hears someone attempting to sneak around the temple testing doors.Martin wakes Arada.00a0 Turin at the back door hears Martin wakep Arada.

Arada climbsp the window to look outside.Martin pulls Eugene out of his trance.Arada sees a couple shadowy figures outside.She motions that there are three outside moving to the side door.

We listen and hear someone push at the side door.Eugene goes to a side window to look outside.00a0 Martin tells Turin what is going on.Arada throws a fish at Penelope.Then throws a large metal gear at her.This wakes herp.

Eugene sees two people just outside the window and puts them to sleep.00a0 He and Arada go out to tie themp.They find four bodies on the ground and tie themp.00a0 They pull one around the corner and wake themp.00a0

The guy says we2019re harboring werewolves.And people are saying these are the werewolves.Their/u201cplan/u201d was for the four of them to club the werewolves.

Eugene tells them to sleep it off and puts them back to sleep.He brings their clubs inside.00a0 Otherwise the night passesneventfully.

Eugene copies the werewolf ritual.

We continue exploring, looking to see if there is somewhere we haven’t looked at. Somewhere there is a Daisy to find. 


As we go back to the entrance, we see another pendulum horror like we fought before. Arada runsp and stabs it. Penelope engages, and Martin sacred flames it.  Turin seriously injures it, shooting over Penelope who is doing her best impression of a wall.



It hits Penelope, injuring her.Which causes Arada to get mad.Penelope then finishes it off.

We are mildly concerned where these things are still coming from.We returnp the slope to the door we came through originally.

We explore more of thepper mine.As we get back to the entrance, we see bandit-like people.

Arada engages them.We have a fight on our hands.Even though we were spread out at the start of the fight, we quickly close ranks.    

One goes down and another is nearly down, though Penelope and Martin both get hurt.   Eugene flies in and webs the survivors.   Martin tries to convince them to surrender, without much luck.   So Turin starts blasting.

We hear a voice from around the corner who says “lookp ”.A sellsword leaps at Eugene and tries to grapple him.Another sellsword tries to run, and gets hurt by Penelope and Martin, and exploded by Eugene.

Eugene sleeps one of them.   There may be a lot of them, but they aren't doing great.The guy on the cliff shoots down again and slips off the cliff.The damage is flying, mostly at them.

They all die, except for the one sleeping, who is going to benhappy when they wakep.

We search the bodies, and find a collection of light crossbows, longswords, and shortswords.Arada also tiesp the prisoner.

We wake himp, and Arada questions him while Eugeneses detect thoughts.

Why are you here ?-We were told to protect the mine from anyone inside ?

Who hired you to do that ?-I'm not sure, I go by what the boss says

I've got bad news, your boss isn't your boss anymore.

  … The surface thoughts are confusion …

      …  -The boss was outside.Why isn't he the boss anymore

Tell me about your boss ?-He's mean.He kicks people's asses for breakfast

What does he look like ?-Big dude.   6'6 ”, Human.   Doesn't wear a lot of armor

  < Hair color >  -Black

Eugene comments it isn't the mine manager

“Who's the mine manager ? We were told the miners were all gone ”

Why did you try to jumps ?-we were told there shouldn't be anyone in the mine and to get rid of them

Do I look like a thief ?-Thoughts of irony

I'm too small to be a thief.  -Sure, you're not a thief, but what about them ?

  …   Could we maybe get dinner sometime at the bar in town ?

How many of you are there ?  -  More outside.

Will they be a problem ?-You'll protect me, right ?

How many ?  -Maybe 5 or six ?

What's your name ?  -Bummy.   Bummy Gears.

What's the name of the jerk outside ?-  Trench Foast

How long have you been here ?-Since early this morning.

You stay here, I'll be back-I don't really have much choice.

…

We make a tentative plan to take a rest in the hut to get resources back, and to leave after that,sing Bummy as a bit of a shield.



Martin sends a message to the person who hireds.   “We've cleaned out a bunch of monsters.There are some sellswords here who claim they've been hired to guard the mine.Did you hire a Trench Foot ? ”-The reply is “I have no idea what you are talking about ”

We bring Bummy into the hut withs.

Turin takes first watch, keeping an eye on the entrance.

After an hour or so, we hear the door open. Turin sees someone come in. The person looks around and ducks back out. After a bit, the door opens again, and someone trying to stealth their way in with someone else behind them.


Turin raps on the hut and Arada goes out with him.We arep to three lackeys. Arada rolls her eyes about the lack of stealth on their part.The torches aren't helping.  

The one at the front sees the bodies and says “oh shit ”.The other two hold position.

Turin casts spike growth.It is on.The one in back manages to flee out back the door, while the other two push in towardss.   Turin takes one out, and the other tries to close, without much success.

We quickly debate if we should rush out, or wait.   We decide to go, with Arada trying to convince Bummy to go out first to get his friends to go home.This works and he does.

He takes a step through the door, “guys, you gotta go home, there is a girl who will go on a date with me if you go home now ”

We hear angry voices saying “what the fuck are you talking about ? ”   Then we hear a loud thump and no more yelling.

Requiescat in pace Bummy.

Martin bonds Penelope, Arada, and Turin.   Aim for the bushes …

ON our way home, walking through the streets, at the corner of Nobles and North Caravan we feel a bitnsteady.Arada falls over.Penelope and Martin notice a weird sensation, like someone is pullings backwards.We feel like we are in a haze.The haze passes, and we find ourselves in the middle of a celebration.We are back in Trademaster square.We decide to take the same route home.We take the same route and get back to the Griffon.

@UUID[JournalEntry.WYUqwerWz80X2CtD]{ Porky } is at the bar reading today ' s riddle:

In halls of stone where echoes sleep,

A guardian of secrets, its vigil keeps.
With no eyes to see, no ears to hear,
Yet senses all who venture near.
What am I ?

We guess potato, small rock, spells, traps.

A)A ghostly whisper B)A magical rune C)A stone golem D)A living shadow

Before we leave, Eugene goes to one of the Watch towers to help setp the Wizard of the Law support group and ask them to help spread the word of how to help, things like sleep, web, sharing spells.u00a0 He is also spreading rumors where we aren2019t going.

Martin visits the temple of Ea to make a prayer for safe travels and for Ea to blesss on our journey.00a0 He spends the rest of the morning going over the wagon to make sure it is safe for the trip.00a0

We also made a supply list for the trip :

    Tents(or are wesing the tiny hut ? )

    Blankets

    Horse blankets(3)

    Horse hobbles(3)

    Bedrolls(5)

    Tarps

    Frame to cover wagon ?

    Rations(2 weeks worth for 5 people ? )

    Food for the horses(2 weeks worth for 3 horses ? )

    Mobile kitchen

    Water/water skins

    Wagon repair tools : Hammer, saw, prybar, plane, chisel, nails, 2-3 iron bands

    Basic tools : shovel, axe, hatchet, 502019 of rope

    map and compass

    Torches

    Pickaxes

    Large chests to store stuff(2)-1 for tarps, bedding etc, 1 for tools

    Locks for chest(2)

    Small keg of ale00a0

    502019 of rope and block and tackle

    Small barrel of apples


On the way out of town, Eugene swigs one of the mystery potions from Thom.TP-17.00a0 He feels like he really wants to get into a fight.He thinks he would be better at it, though who knows if he would or not.00a0 It also tastes likerine mixed with raspberry.

In the early afternoon, we head out towards Caravan Gate at a normal pace.On the way, Martin thinks we2019re being followed one block west.He has Eugene send a message to Turin who peels back to follow the person on Ace.00a0 Martin turns to take a different street and the mystery man backtracks a little.00a0

Martin is positive we are being followed, but not sure who.He thinks it could be walking, riding, or hiding above.He tells Arada to watch the roofs, Penelope to watch riders and Eugene to watch pedestrians.


He sees Antonio on a street corner.00a0 Martin tells Penelope to see what he wants and Martin will bring the cart back in 15 minutes.Antonio ducks down an alley and Penelope follows.Penelope feels someone brush against her and hears a whisper from the alleyway/u201cyou didn2019t see me, I2019m not here, go away./u201d00a0 Penelope turns around.Arada saw Marita brush against Penelope.00a0


Martin makes a loop and picksp Penelope.Penelope checks her pockets but doesn2019t find anything.00a0 Martin still thinks we are being followed but we head out Caravan Gate, rejoining Turin on the way.

At Caravan Gate, we see Jillie and Torik.00a0 Jillie wants to know where we are going.Torik wants to know why we left without him.Jillie wants to know if she can come withs.00a0 Arada sees Torik try to sneak onto the wagon and Penelope holds him down.00a0 Martin talks with Jillie and promises to send messages as much as possible.00a0 He also promises to bring her a present.00a0 Torik says we should hold him down so he has to follow.Eventually Torik gets browbeaten into staying.In all this, we gather a large crowd.00a0 Best sneaking out ever.

As we go through the gate, the gate guards recognizes and tells to have fun.

We spend some time on the road,sing the last few hours of daylight.At least we don2019t see any sign of being followed.

We are on the road and realize we are going to have to probably camp out at night.We find a good spot about twenty feet off the road.The weather is overcast and chilly, and we decide to setp watches.Eugene, Turin, then Penelope and Martin(aka the can2019t see in the dark crew).

Turin also starts training Ace to simple commands.

Through the night, nothingntoward happens.00a000a0


2014----------------

19th

The next morning, we continue along and spend another day on the road.On the second night, the main caravan route continues North, and a smaller road turns towards Oakridge.00a0 There are a few ruins where a settlement might have once been.00a0 We expect the night to be a bit chillier.

Before bed Martin checks in with Lyza who comments on our stealthy way of getting out of town.

Similar watches, with Arada joining middle watch.00a0

During the second watch, they hear howling in the distance to the east.00a0 Best they can tell, it is wolves that are quite a distance away.



2014--------------

20th


The next day we continue east, passing the occasional farm with the river to our left.00a0 We pass the odd hamlet.00a0 Towards noon, we come to a town.00a0

It has the standard issue taller fence walls, but the streets are mostly empty and it smells run down.00a0 The few villagers we see glance furtively, and seem eager to move from place to place.

There doesn2019t seem to be an inn, though there is a tavern, when we go to for lunch.

The bored tavern keeper leans against a post.00a0 Through small(very small)talk, he tellss the town2019s name is Tarnsworth and we should leave.

He says the town is cursed, and the howling is driving folks mad.00a0 People go missing or get killed.Animals have been killed, thesual.He says it has been going on for a few weeks.It started small, but now the howling happens most of the night.It seems to be coming from the southeast.

He says we could talk to mayor Gorgeson, but he is in mourning since his son died three days ago.We have a small conference and decide the appropriate response is/u201cbig damn heroes time/u201d.

We eat lunch and decide to go see the mayor.After some wandering through the town, we see a church and a mansion.00a0 Mostly people look ats and close their windows, but Gredel, an old half-elf woman, comes running towardss.She askss if we are here for the guard work for her cows, milk and cheese.00a0 Cream got eaten.00a0

We tell her we will come to her place after we talk to the head cleric.We enter the church, and meet a middle age tiefling woman and ask for more information about the howling.

We get similar information from her.She says itsed to happen once a blood moon(i.e.every few years), but now it is every night.00a0

We go to Gredel2019s and she greetss at the door.00a0 She takess to the back yard, with a fenced off area and three stalls.She says a few nights ago the howling got close, and she heard a scream and a commotion.

The door to the stall is ripped off and there are deep claw marks.00a0 Turin takes a look and the tracks are paw prints, but this looks like bipedal.00a0 Turin hypothesizes some kind of were creature.The tracks lead through part of the stone wall that has been knocked down.

We leave Ace and the draft horses at Gredels and head south.We eventually reach the woods, which is wet, dense, and without a path.00a000a0

Turin leadss through the woods.Along the way he finds a tarnished cowbell that says/u201cCream/u201d.00a0 It is getting short on daylight, so we decide to head back.00a0 As we get to the edge of the woods, we hear howling, and growling behinds.00a0 We double time it back to the town.

Gredel thinks we will have time to get the horses to the church stable.We do so, and come back to watch her cows.The wagon stays outside, though we do take the meat we have into the stables.

We setp an ambush area and wait for the woofs.

In the morning we get an envelope that says "Tonight, she'll be there at The Midnight Oil with friends."

The day ' s patrol isneventful, and that evening we go out to The Midnight Oil which is in the north section along Nobles Way.The bar sign is a bed on fire.

We get a table in the inn.It is full.We order a round of brown ale.We also ask if she has ever seen Antonio and his girlfriend around.We describe Antonio and she thinks she vaguely recognizes him.Penelope thinks she sees a possible candidate near the fireplace.Arada goes over to scope her out.She overhears a bunch of standard late teens social gossip.The girl is a little better off than her compatriots.

Eugene considerssing the Detect Thoughts to see if the girl is our mark.Before that, he chooses tose the message cantrip to message her.They have a short mental conversation.She ' s skeptical, and wants to know who we are.Eugene says we are friends of Claudia De la Riis.She suspects we are sent by Paul De la Riis who is one of the leaders of the Young Stallions.

Adelade sidles next to Arada and asks why she is hiding down there.Arada says people watching.A drunk halfling comes to make conversation.The halfling named Prithin tries a pickup line on Arada.Aradases this as an excuse to go sit with the girls.Meanwhile the tiefling who was at the bar acts as a bouncer to kick Prithin out.The girl is Isabella.There is also Marita, Sybella, and Agatha.Arada introduces herself as Notia.Marita says her boyfriend is great and his name is Antonio.Arada asks if they are serious.Arada shmoozes.Marita tells a story that matches with the story we are expected.Arada offers to help if she can.She says she is a romantic and girls gotta stick together.Arada offers to help without pushing too hard.She gets mild resistance, but seems to think three days from now makes sense to meet again.

Arada fillssin and suggests we leave.

A drunk half elf approachess and tries to pick a fight with Martin then Turin.Martin sends him to the girls and leaves.We leave before the bar fight.

We go back to the Giggling Griffon.As we start to go to sleep, we feel the ground shake.We get the lurching sensation in our stomachs.This one feels really bad.Martin runs to the window.It is Earthday the 6th.

Arada takes the creepy dagger.00a0 Eugene takes the starter set of the necromantic arts.He also takes a small number of crystal shards.


Arada examines the secret door.It is not trapped or locked, but she hears the sound or armor on the other side.We go through the door and there is a figure in dark armor.It draws its paired long and short swords.Eugene panics and launches a fire bolt, mildly singing it.It swings at Penelope and hits for serious damage.



00a0


Arada leaps over it, and gibbets it in the kidneys.The body has the two swords which Penelope takes.Martin examines the body of the half-elf.00a0


The door on the far side is not locked.Arada hears the sounds of moaning.She opens the door.00a0


We enter a room from hell.It appears to be a torture chamber.There is a human male and a tiefling female, both shackled to a wall.On the table is a potted plant.The mummy animates.00a0



The mummy swings at Turin.Turin and Penelope both attack and do damage.Arada leaps on it and attacks, plunging a dagger in its neck.00a0


Martin heals the two people in stocks while Arada releases them.The woman is very freaked.Lena and Tatum are the names of the couple.Lena was kidnapped and Tatum tried and failed to rescue her.They say the cultists have taken over the church.00a0 It has all been women that they have seen.We offer drinks.Arada examines the chest which contains a small amount of money.


We take them back to the main room and Martin stays with them, while the rest of the party examines the last door.Arada checks the door and the group goes into a brief hallway which ends at a secret door that is locked.Arada checks for traps andnlocks the door.00a000a0


They find a small office with a desk.On the desk are a silver mark, five dice and a sheet of paper and quill.The paper has two columns with a symbol at the top of each.Other than that there are old robes and nothing otherwise exciting.The door leads outside.Penelope looks where there ought to be a space.The group thinks they have seen the church and side building.00a0


Lena and Tatum ask to be escorted back to Killwitch.The whole area is still incredibly foggy.As we start to walk away, we hear a sound.00a0 In the mist we see an evil deathnicorn which runs away.




We make it back to townneventfully.Lena has a touching reunion with her brother, and there is a happy family get together.He givess a pouch containing 50 gold crowns, which we return .Instead we ask for room and board.He writess a long, and poorly written letter that explains how awesome we are.

Martin sends a message to Lyza/u201cLyza, wenderstand you are in thendercroft.Can you confirm ? We are working on a plan.Hang tight.P.S.It2019s Martin/u201d He gets a reply:/u201cI think I am.Don2019t do anything stupid.I can hear chanting and strange noises./u201d00a0 Martin doesn2019t pass along the/u201cdon2019t do anything stupid part./u201d


A shady looking guy enters the bar and greets Arada.They chat briefly and he passes something to her.00a0 When he leaves, Arada explains that there is a shift change at midnight, and there is a brief opportunity to go over the wall, into the prison proper, and on the ground level there is a main hallway and a trap door going down.00a0

They only know of the one entrance to thendercroft, but there is a rumor of another one.The wall is 25 feet tall or so.Arada regrets not having a grappling hook.Pondering, she reaches into a pocket in the back of her vest and pulls out a foldable grappling hook.Martin also expresses a desire to avoid00a0killing any guardsnnecessarily and fors to try to be the good guys if we can.


We take our tabards off and head to the Grey Halls.Turin casts Pass Without a Trace to makes stealthier.We look and don2019t see anyone at the top of the walls.Arada climbsp, stumbling briefly.Turin follows, and they pullp Eugene.They pullp Martin and Penelope shows off to climbp herself, immediately falling to the ground.A second time, we all make it to the top.We remember to gather the rope and hook.

Arada listens at the door and cautiously opens it.We enter.Turin heads down first due to darkvision, with Arada following.00a0

On the first floor, there are three doors, one with a view down the hallway.They see a guard down the end of the hallway.Time to be sneaky.00a0 Turin gets the rest ofs.Martin recommends quicksaving.


Arada opens the door we were told about and slips in.It is a storage room with nothing stored.Turin notices the ground sound hollow and finds a hidden trap door.00a0 Arada doesn2019t find any traps and opens itp.00a0

There is an iron ladder leading down.00a0 There is a landing with a set of double doors.Arada hears heavy breathing like someone has been running, with a touch of panic.We slip in, and there are people there who are not guards.It looks like an intake area with a couple thugs and a cage opening like an airlock.

A thug aims at Turin and misses.Turin shoots at the caged guard.And then the other guard.Killing both.There is a logbook that ends yesterday.00a0 Martin frisks one guard and discovers a Black Hand mark.00a0

Arada hears nothing at the next door, which is alsonlocked.There is a small hall with two doors.Arada listens at the north door and hears nothing.The west door and really hears nothing.The door north is locked for sure.00a0

Turin hears a voice to the west who says/u201cI don2019t know who you are, but I highly recommend you leave.This is not a safe place/u201d.So Aradanlocks the west door and we go in.It is a guardroom with beds, tables, etc.The next door isnlocked.Turin and Arada go in.00a0


Martin closes his eyes and listens.There is a sound he doesn2019t expect.Eugene opensp his magical eyes and sees a red haired woman invisible in the southwest corner.It is the woman from the ship and the contest.


She says she was sent down here and is leaving.Something has gone wrong and there are creatures.Martin casts zone of truth to make her talk.She says her boss is the Nameless One.She says she has never seen him.She gets messages.She knows Swiftsword is a customer of the Black Hand.She is trying to avoid confirming that she is a member of the Black Hand.

She got the instructions to come here this afternoon at one of the drops.She doesn2019t completely know what was supposed to happen.A sorcerer was supposed to try something and it went wrong.00a0 The others with her were grunts.00a0

Turin says we are going to take her equipment and tie herp.Arada takes a step to the side and holds her action.She bolts past Turin.Arada produces a couple spikes and a hammer from her vest and spikes the door shut.00a0

We go back to the other door and Aradanlocks it.There is another set of double doors.Arade hears the sound of the flutter of wings(large bat or small dragon).It sounds like something being dragged across the floor.Eugeneses magic to look through the door.He sees a medium sized room, with a few dead bodies, and two small flying lava things Eugene recognizes as magma mephits.There is also a snail-like thing in the middle of the room with five heads and a multi-hued shell Eugene recognizes and a Flail snail.00a0

Martin says teamwork makes the dream work and we bust in.Turin launches a pair of arrows killing the close one.00a0 One of the mephits breathes flame ons.Penelope kills it in response.00a0

The snail makes five swings against Penelope, hitting twice.Turin fires at the snail, doing massive damage.Arada stabs it.Seriously stabs it.Penelope kills the snail as two more mephits enter.Martin runsp to heal Penelope and takes a face full of fire for his trouble.00a0

Turin kills the second mephit.Arada charges the other one and stabs it.Eugene hits it with a fire bolt causing it to explode in a 36 point critical.00a0

Penelope and Turin check the corridor for cells.They are all empty, though Penelope finds a plant.00a0

Arada picks the lock on the other door.Inside is another snail thing.Two snail things.Martin casts spirit guardians which does max damage.00a0 Who knew.

Turin crits it with his first shot,tterly smacking it.00a000a0

The remaining snail attacks Penelope doing major damage.Martin stepsp to heal Penelope and do more spirit guardian damage.Arada damages the snail for hurting her Penelope.Turin finishes off the snail, and then the last mephit.00a0

Eugene sees another snail in the distance and fires at it.Two more mephits also joins the fray.We pick off the snail before it can close.One mephit gets killed, and more showp.00a0 Martin blocks the door with his spirit guardians.00a0

When the last one dies, it explodes, hitting Arada and Penelope for moderate damage.

We still haven2019t found Lyza, but we2019ve made progress at least.And Martin has nine more minutes of spirit guardians2026

journals.name: Finally a break.Let ' s break stuff

text.content:
In the morning Martin heals Jillie ’s mom.   On his way back, he gets a ping on the map for the Tower Defense book.He runs back to the Griffon.They tell Lyza that A)Jillie isn't missing and B)Martin has an idea where the book is, and hopefully the women are with it.We explain that Eugene can try to message the women to see if they are there.  


Lyza askss to let her know what we find before doing anything rash.   We say of course we will.Wink wink.

We head to the area Martin got the ping.Arada spots a guy in the bushes and stealthily goes over to investigate.He is a dwarf that Arada knows as Notia.He says there is something he thinks Notia might be interested in.   Meanwhile Eugene starts the process of trying to message the three women.    

Blackrock the dwarf says there is way more money in the fabric store(Fine Silks and Fabrics, L11)cashbox than there ought to be.He says they have been casing it for a while , and occasionally there seems to be someone who goes in who doesn't come out.  

Arada takes the party down the street to tell them what she has learned.The fabric store has way too much money to be legit.  

Eugene has no initial luck with his messaging, but now he knows more he will try deeper.

Morning Day 2-Go patrol the Labyrinth

Past Plaza of Troubadors then to Fogelberry street

Note: No brothels

Fogelberry and Cross St.We have an adventure

There is a wolf attacking a small boy.we are being heroic.Martin cast shield of faith on the boy and Penelope.The wolf attacked Penelope and hurt her.Then Arada hit it with her shortbow and did a lot of damage.Turin finished off the wolf.Then the boy laughs ats and says we are funny.A giant rat appears.Penelope tackled the kid, Turin and Martin chased a thief that was yelled out by the crowd.They chased him to the Thieves market.Meanwhile, Penelope, Arada, and Eugene discussed the appropriate level of corporal punishment.Two local guards appeared.One @UUID[JournalEntry.4pk1PyuDgUzhhqwZ]{Lucille Rilossa} recognized the boy as Cal.Turin and Martin chase the thief, over roofs to the theives market.Turin jumps off a building Bad Boys style.Eventually we herd him back to the party and arrest him.We turned him into Lucille.She is interested in ournit.

journals.name: Goblins, and Kobolds, and Gurgs, Oh my...

text.content:
Penelope tries to lift the portcullis, but fails.She asks for help from Turin.It is still firmly stuck.   Arada finds a lock, but it doesn'tnlock.We decide to go check the far end of the other hallway.

An opening leads to the east, into an irregular cave with a walkway and a bridge over a chasm.There are thick webs all over the room.There are webbed shapes in the northwest corner.In the southwest corner are some large opalescent spider eggs.Lookingp we see …nothing.   Jk, it is a big spider.


The large spider drops down and tries to bite Turin but misses.Turin swings back and does a good chunk of damage.   He runs across the bridge which holds his weight.Martin brings in light and Arada attacks it, killing it.  

We carefully cross the bridge.Penelope goes last, and the bridge breaksnder her.She barely makes it to the other edge, Turin helping herp.Unfortunately the passage is collapsed with a skeleton at the pile.The skeleton's chain mail is rusty, but the cloak seems almost new.   As Eugene reaches for the cloak, the skeleton attacks.  

Arada misses it, but Turin hits with an arrow.Penelopeses her combat expertise to move Eugene out of the way(Bait and Switch FTW).Eugene kills it with his last spell(Magic Missile FTW).   Eugene tries the cloak on, and finds it is a cloak of protection.Probably.

 We lower Arada to the ground, and she touches down after 25 feet.After much discussion, we climb down.Martin tries to check the bodies, which have been liquified.We exit through the southern passage, and Eugene torches the place on the way out, including a small swarm of spiderlings.

We take a short rest in the boss room.Aradanwedges Gurg's door, and Martin knocks on the door to wake Gurgp.Nobody stirs, so we go in.Martin tries to wake Gurg and fails, but Arada wakes him.Gurg wants to know what is happening, and Martin convinces him that there is an evacuation and he needs to open the portcullis.  

Gurg rips the portcullis off the frame, drinks the contents of the cauldron down, and goes back to go to bed.After a short distance the tunnel is collapsed, which looks fairly recent.  

A voice booms: There's nothing else here.   Go back to the inn.

So we get back to the inn, mid-evening or so.

We explain to the townsfolk about the dungeons, the kobolds, and the spectre.We killed the goblins, but the kobold leader(Kirrich)and their band are still out there.Eugene shows them the goblin insignias, which are from all over, including the tribe that attacked Turin's village.Turin knows it is rare for this many tribes to cooperate.  

We also mention the pixie(Lalalna)and they are moderately mortified.

Turin is sure that with the spirit, something is going on.

Eugene tries to wake the koboldp, eventually doing so.00a0 We now have an awake terrified kobold.His name is Gurbo.00a0


How many of you are there ?00a0 Just me now.

How many were there ? Many.

Are there more many groups like you ? Yes, all over world.We take over some day ?

What was thendead horse ? Scaryndead horse zombienicorn.

Did it talk to you ? No, chief talked to it.

Did it talk in a language chiefnderstood ? Dunno, I didn2019tnderstand.

Was it mean conversation ? No

When did you first see it ? Just before we showedp.

Did anyone in your group know about it ? Some did.

Was this the first time you interacted with it ? First time I did.

What were you trying to do when you attacked it ? Dunno, boss knew.00a0 Scary ghost guy told boss, boss knew.

Were you attacking it ? No, you(party)attacked first.

What can you tells about scary ghost guy ? He2019s not solid.

Can younderstand ? Yes, speaks common.

What did it tell you ? Nothing.It talk to chief.

Did you overhear anything ? < What we heard in boss room >

Where is your camp ? Were camping with goblins, now on our own.

What will you do next ? Depends on what you do .

If we let you go, what will you do ? Find more kobolds.


While the interrogation goes nowhere, Turin looks for zombie hoofprints.There are some leading north.


We head back to the wagon, with Turin lingering behind for2026 reasons.


We head back to Haven2026

journals.name: Hot time in the Foundry tonight...this afternoon.

text.content:
We all stand around looking at a face down mirror.We take a bolt of cloth to wrap it around the mirror and discuss taking it to Lady Roweena Geronde who we met after dealing with her family crypt in @UUID[JournalEntry.YJQDtzQdQE2nXrpx]{ Mirror mirror on the...wait, where did everybody go ? } .


Eugene, Turin, and Penelope discuss the best way to wrap and carry the mirror.Arada and Martin look around.Martin finds a few interesting mechanical toys.Arada finds a bag of clinky stuff.Eugene does a last look around and finds a cryptex.00a0


We realize we ought to be back to meet Olivia soon, so we head to the Griffon, stopping briefly at the Haven Ironworks since it is on the way.As we approach the ironworks, it is a hive of industry, with activity on the inside.00a0 Just inside there is a security dwarf who pointss to Dahlia.

She says she can helps, if we get appropriate authorization.She also says asks if we can help her with some clockwork dogs that are wandering around and periodically attacking things and causing trouble.We agree to help in a sort of informal quid pro quo.Also some of her people are in there: Seraphina and Grimm.


We meet Seraphina.She doesn2019t know how many dogs there are.00a0 She also offers to help with the tower, but she has lost her tools.00a0

Arada opens a door and finds a dog.

There is also a dwarf in the room, keeping his distance.00a0 Turin steps in to take a shot at the dog.Eugene hits it with a firebolt.The dog runsp and attempts to bite Eugene but misses.Arada finishes it off.00a0


Grimm gruffly thankss and asks not to speak with Martin any more.00a0

Grimm and Seraphina have a cutscene.00a0


The next room is very warm, so we go back to the other side of the entrance.Penelope shouts/u201cLook!Another dog!/u201d Lo and behold there is another dog.Arada runsp and misses it.Turin attacks and hits.Eugene and Penelope finish it off.


Arada opens a door and shouts/u201cDog!/u201d On command the dog decides to fetch.Specifically fetch Penelope2019s spleen.Martin heals Penelops and tells the dog it is a bad dog.Arada and Penelope both miss the dog badly.The dog also misses because it feels bad.Turin thwacks it with an arrow.Penelope kills a third clockwork dog.


Moving on we see another dog.There is also a half-elf dressed in office clothing cowering near the dog.In a cutscene, the dog kills the accountant(Lars Koppercoil).00a0


Penelope engages and hits and kills the dog.Martin heals the accountant and brings him back from the dead.Meanwhile Eugene sees another dog.A worker is avoiding the dog.Korbin is a really, really tall goliath.As we rush in, there is yet another dog to the north.Martin pokes the dog to the north with a spell.Turin then explodes it with an arrow.Penelope swings at hers and misses.Korbin hits it with a hammer fist and it crumbles.00a0


We continue looking for dogs and tools.And taking the accountant to the door.We decide to explore the east half of the foundry.00a0 Yay, another dog!00a0 It charges and bites at Arada.But misses.Penelope hurts it badly.00a0 Do clockwork dogs feel pain ? Martin tickles it with a spell and Turin finishes it.In a very hot room Penelope and Turin find a steel like ingot.Haven steel maybe ?


Turin, Eugene, and Penelope explore the back and find a few lumps of Ironwood coal.


We think we2019ve explored the whole place and go back to talk to Dahlia, Seraphina, Grimm, and the Accountant.Martin gives Seraphina her tools.Eugene asks about the ingot we found.It isnfinished Haven steel, but if we get a letter from the mayor of city council we can get it.


Martin also tells her if they see more to talk to their local watch to sends word.


We go back to the inn to report to Lyza.Neither Lyza nor Olivia are there.

journals.name: I ' ve had it with these Monday to Friday bodies in this Melon Farmer tower

text.content:
Eugene goes to see if Thom can do a quick mend but there is no answer.

Martin asks Porky and Mrs Clever if they have seen Lyza and they say not recently.  

We decide to go see how Olivia, the tower and/or Mayor are doing.

On the door of Olivia's shop is a note that says “Gone Junk Picking, Back Whenever. ” We leave the shop to stop by the Mayor's palace to ask about our note.The clerk directss to the second floor.We go to the Mayor's office to ask.Many people are working outside.We leave a note for the mayor to authorizes to get some Haven Steel from the Have Ironworks to fix the Haven Clockwork Tower of Doom.

< Eugene writes a note for the Mayor and gives it to Maurice, the Chief Clerk to the Mayor >

Turin checks to see if the Mayor is in, but doesn't find anything.Arada thinks she recognizes one of the clerks(Chelsea).She hands her tabard and sneaks over.Arada confirms the mayor is out at some function .  

We trundle downstairs and walk to the tower fully expecting to see a group of guardsmen.But there aren't any that we can see.There does appear to be rope tied around the pillars as a vague caution tape.There is an empty chair and a bottle and some cigarette butts.  

Eugene asks a passerby if they know where the guard are.The passenger says they were there earlier today.Turin sees a black handprint beside the open door.   Eugene, Penelope and Arada go to Noble Way Station and see if they know why the guard aren't there.Martin and Turin stay to keep an eye out inconspicuously.The sergeant is stunned to hear the crew isn't there.He says he is going to send a squad and come look too.

Meanwhile Turin sits in the chair and Martin goes to look and see if anyone is keeping an eye.Martin sees a dwarf to the north leaning against the pillar to the north.Martin asks what the dwarf is doing and he says he is waiting for a friend.Martin wants to know what friend and why he is there.The dwarf is not cooperative.He is wearing a chestplate.A female tiefling comesp and asks if the copper is causing problems.Martin explains that the watch is trying to keep people from getting slaughtered inside.And lots of entrails.  

Eventually the party returns.They see a female tiefling against the pillar.Martin is pretty sure it is the same woman.He tells Arada, Penelope, and Eugene about the dwarf and tiefling.The sergeant comes back with a troop of men.They will keep guard while we go in.

We go in.There are blood stains and dead bodies.A human male with a guard tabard and human female in dark colors.Turin can tell both bodies have lots of little bites, as if they were bitten by large spiders.We haul the bodies back outside and give them to the sergeant.

Tick and tock say there were two in the tower and both killed by the spiders.And we are friends to the tower.So we have that going fors.We decide to have a quick look around.We tie a rope around Martin and Penelope and Turin and hold him while he peeks in at the death robot.No bodies, so yay.A quick look around the tower shows nothing else either.

Turin looks for guard footprints.In the southwest corner he sees a spot where the guard footprints turn to drag marks.The marks lead to the path north of Guilder's Park.There may be a couple sets of footprints.The tracks lead towards the Guildhall of Provenders.Turin finds some additional drag marks leading to where the body might have gotten pickedp.  

We let the sergeant know what we found.He has another set of guards.The missing guards will take a large dent out of their complement.The sergeant is going to talk to the officers and comep with a new plan for securing it.

We head back to the inn via Olivia's but the note was still there.We return to the inn.Porky says No Lyza but a fancy pants came with a scroll case .Based on the markings it appears to be official city business.We open it and find a piece of parchment on official city letterhead authorizings to obtain reasonable amounts of Haven Steel and Ironwood coal.Signed by Elspeth Windermere.  

It is late, so we decide to go to sleep.

journals.name: If you give a hag a cookie...

text.content:
We return to the hag's clearing.


As we approach, we see Toothache, who howls and lopes off to the north west.We hear an answering howl.We follow.We keep going forwardntil we see the hag standing on the rock.


She says, so you came back.   Did you deal with the bear ?   Does it live ?


Yes.    


She asks what we expect her to do .   We remind her that she said she would helps cure the kids of their malaise.   She seems eager to break her word, but Martin reminds her that is exactly what she said would happen.


She reluctantly givess two vials of clear liquid with amber flecks in it.


We take about a half day to get back to the farm.


The other priestess is not thrilled that we didn't get the flower.We give her the phials, and she opens them and they smell awful.Martin tries a finger taste of one, and they don't taste like medicine.   He is pretty sure that this won't help.


Arada thinks that killing the kids would technically fulfil the hag's bargain.    


Eugene casts a ritual augury, ”is it weal or woe to dose the sick children these potions ”.   The answer is woe.He also confirms it is non-magical.


Arada pours a little on a bug.   The bug dies.


The priestess(who dabbles in alchemy)has nothing to add.


We discuss our options.   Threaten the hag or kill the hag seem to be the two  



We rest the night.


In the morning, Martin ritually casts detect poison.   The potions are poison.


We return to the hag's clearing.



We decide to give her the chance to surrender because we are the good guys.


Martin nominates Penelope to be the spokesperson because she is the most intimidating.He casts guidance on Penelope, and bonds Adada, Penelope and himself.


We approach the hag and the wolves.We 're sure it will be fine.


Toothache comes runningp, and Arada jumps on top of it. /u00a0


Turin shoots at Toothache and criticals him.Toothache is very definitely hurt. /u00a0 Turin shoots him again, killing him.So we' re doing this apparently.


The hag isnimpressed. /u00a0 /u00a0


The hag turns invisible. /u00a0


Bonemeal rushesp and attacks Arada and misses.Eugeneses see invisibility to get an eye on the hag.Martin runs forward and casts spirit guardians getting the wolf, and hopefully the hag.


Arada leaps onto the back of Bonemeal to stab it, killing it.Turin tries to shoot the hag, winging her.The hag takes a pathetic amount of spirit guardians damage. /u00a0 She seems to split in two. /u00a0


Penelope runsp and stabs at one of the hags and the duplicate disappears.It hits, but Penelope becomes afraid of the hag.Eugene hits her with a fire bolt.Arada runsp, but misses.


Turin shoots the hag again, nearly killing her.A second shot finishes her off.


Negotiations were successful ?


We search the area. /u00a0 On the hag, we find two small vials of a liquid, hopefully the correct ones this time.Eugene confirms they are curative magic. /u00a0


Martin finds a hidden door which leads to the hag 's lair.


Martin finds a locked box and calls for Arada who easilynlocks it.She finds 120 gold pieces, two potions of greater healing, 1 potion of mind reading, 1 potion of gaseous form, and a wand of wonder(which still needs to be identified).


Martin casts detect poison again, and finds the remains of her potion still.And an assortment of plants and mushrooms.We do find the flower the priestess was looking for .We also take the chest to carry stuff in and head back to the farm.


Eugene identifies the potions are curative.We administer them, and they come out of their stupor. /u00a0 Thomas is relieved.The kids promise to never go near the hag' s place again.


We go back to Oakridge, and it is late in the day.The townfolk have gathered 35 silver to thanks for opening the mine. /u00a0


Martin goes to the general store to get something to bring back to Jillie.


Martin casts sending to Lyza /u201cWe 're done here is, it safe fors to come back to Haven ? /u201d /u201cYes, it should be, but don' t rush. /u201d


/u2014


It is the second of Richfest. /u00a0 The mayor has arranged for a barge to takes and the horses and cart downriver.We head off. /u00a0 /u00a0


We float downriver, with the bargemaster guidings.


Mid - afternoon, we see on the shore a dwarf who looks beaten down, he seess and calls for help. /u00a0 We pull over. /u00a0 Big damn heroes.


He says /u201cI 've been walking all day, we need help. /u201d


Martin stops him. /u00a0 We' re not playing the pronoun game today.Who are you and who is we ? /u201d


/u201cSigh.But I like the pronoun game. /u00a0My name is Andreas and my buddies and I were doing some mining and we got attacked by a bunch of ogres. /u00a0 There were 8 plus a really big one.It was me and 13 of my friends.Some of them made it into some ruins. /u201d


We travel for a few hours through scrubland, getting into some foothills.We come towards a cliff with some old, old ruins. /u00a0 The only thing standing are a couple towers.



Andreas says his buddies are in the tower and the ogres are in a door on the cliff.

Starday morning2026

Since he doesn2019t need to sleep as much, Eugene studies the spellbook.00a0 The book contains 4th level spells, putting them at 7th or 8th level.00a0 Otherwise we get rest.Thom has tried things with Lyza, but nothing much has changed.

We getp, and haven2019t seen hide nor hair of Porky, but we do hear sound from the kitchen.Eugene comesp from the basement.Before Martin can go downstairs, there is a pounding at the door with a deep voice/u201cOpenp in the name of the City Guard./u201d We look out the window and see at least 20 people.00a0 One of the people is Swiftsword.They are all wearing Heights tabards.00a0

When we gotp, we saw the door was barred.00a0 We have a quick discussion about what to do .00a0

He demands we turn over Lyza who is being accused of treason.Turin has a quick look out the back.There are more guys out back.He finds a hiding spot to keep watch.00a0 We quickly run over the people we could try to contact.00a0 Lucille, Lady Roweena, Hars de la Riis, the Mayor, Gilberto Maggio, Tenley Tainley.00a0

Martin send a Sending to Hars de la Riis, telling him that Lyza is being accused of treason and we are holedp in the Griffon.00a0 He says give him 5 minutes.Swiftsword says we haventil a count of 10.00a0 Eugene casts his hut spell to try to block the door.Turin casts a spike growth in the middle of the back to try to block it off.

They start to hit the door with a battering ram.They break the bar, but the hut prevents the door from opening.00a0 They realize there is something blocking the way.We hear a smash as one of them breaks a window.This is getting messy.

Arada starts running around causing mayhem without trying to get into combat.Martin yells to Mrs Clever who says she doesn2019t know where Porky is.More guards start to smash windows.Penelope tries to block a window.00a0 Arada carries on with the mayhem.00a0

Martin yells that we won2019t let them take Lyza to the Black Hand and that we know he2019s connected to them, and we2019ve given the proof to the council of guild leaders.00a0 Swiftsword bellows.We suspect we aren2019t going to last five minutes.

Arada taunts Swiftsword who is not happy.Penelope keeps pushing them out windows.Martin casts Heroism on Penelope and takes a critical for his trouble.00a0 Penelope is pissed.Arada downs one of the guards outside and jumps through a window to get back inside.Penelope downs the guard who hit Martin.00a0

Swiftsword decides to join the combat and misses.00a0 The guards out back start to advance and enter Turin2019s spike growth.00a0 The spike growth does major damage, and Turin shoots one.The door to the cellar where Lyza is is also out back, so holding it firm to keep them away from her is vital.

Still, as long as the bad guyscontinue to follow the wisdom of J2019hakee Chann and come ats one at a time, we might have a chance.

Arada hears a voice in her head saying/u201cget everybody down/u201d.00a0 She drops to the ground dragging Penelope with her.00a000a0

From the grassy area, she sees a streak of lightning jump out and hit one of the guys.And another one.00a0 And another one.And another one.And another one.Somewhere D2019hee Jhay Khallid is pleased.Lady Roweena has entered the fray, and she is pissed.

Out back, the guys arensure what to do with the spikes.So they keep advancing, because it has to work eventually.

Penelope knocks Swiftsword out with a surge of action.

Martin tries to convince them to surrender and drop their swords and testify against Swiftsword.00a0 He gets three to do so.00a0 Eugene does something similar and gets one more to surrender.

Outside Roweenases her lightning again, and the front rank die.Penelope can see the end of the street and sees Porky with more guards.Out back, Turin sees more guards being led by Lucille.She calls them to drop their weapons.They do , and Turin drops his spikes.

A third lightning bolt finishes them off, accidentally killing Swiftsword.At least it wasn2019ts.

In the aftermath, we have roundedp 16 members of the Heights watch, who are carted off to jail by the watchmen who are there.They refuse to talk tos, and are quiet being carted away.

In the aftermath, Swiftsword2019s body is dragged into the bar, and we talk with the cavalry.

They were led by Porky, Roweena, Lucille, and Hars.Hars apologizes it took so long.00a000a0

The story comes out that after we went to rescue Lyza, Porky went to Hars, who went to Roweena, and also talked to some of the guard and Lucille at the suggestion of Porky.

Martin goes to tell Thom who lets him in.Lyza is sittingp, and is groggy.She is awake but not totally here.Martin also casts Protection from Poison on her to help cure her.He and Thom start taking herpstairs.

We ask if people had suspicions about Swiftsword before this.They tells he was always resistant, but they thought it was out of jealousy.00a0 Nobody is sure how many of the Heights watch is Black Hand.They promise to take appropriate steps to find out how far this is spread.

Lucille speaksp and says she thinks the Market Barracks are clean and points out most of the Market Barracks guards came to help.

Penelope wonders aloud what was happening in thendercroft which is a surprise to the cavalry.She explains the summoner and mephits.Eugene starts explaining thendercroft.

Thom, Lyza, and Martin comepstairs.00a000a0

Lyza looks at Swiftsword2019s body and wonders what happened.Roweena explains we tried to keep him alive, but stuff happened.We don2019t think he has family, certainly not in Haven.

Martin explains the human trafficking ringnder Fine Silks run by Adrielle Ilorim.And that Swiftsword wassing them.00a0 Hars asks Lucille to lead the investigation into Swiftsword and what he may or may not have been doing.00a0 He also says Lady Roweena may know some people who could help.Hars remindss about the tower.

Turin also makes sure she knows about the trap door.

We also tell her about the double dead wizard fellow, which raises some eyebrows.

Roweena leaves with the body and Hars leaves with Lucille.

We decide to get some breakfast.Martin breaks out the Mending and Carpenter2019s Tools as Thom heals the rest ofs.

journals.name: Let's play a drinking game. Rule 1: Drink.

text.content:
After the @ JournalEntry.iPnt7WOtvXE2MT01.JournalEntryPage.wS3SAKOPWX4G04HF we are given the past day and a half off.Arada and Penelope goes drinking, Eugene scribes some spells, and we otherwise relax.

Towards evening, Penelope, Arada, Martin, and Turn decide to go out drinking.We endp at the Seasick Parrot, which turns out to be a lot nicer than we expected being on the docks next to a tattoo parlor.It is a local drinking hole with music and conversation.

Our waitress, Brandi Justcallifyouneedme bringss some of the house ale, which is strong and bad.We toast to not being dead.Arada vaguely recognizes the barkeep from the guild.Penelope ask for a song from the bard who hits on the redheads.

There is a nearby table of dwarves that is drunk, that Penelope really wants to have start a fight so we can finish it.Fortunately the dwarf launches itself at Penelope.The desired bar fight ensues.We kick their butts and Martin heals the injured(mostly them).

Meanwhile, Eugene has a dinner with Thom to learn more about her.He learns that Thom loves to experiments with potions, and volunteers that the party would be glad to test them out.He also learns that Thom doesn ' t remember her childhood, and was raised by Lyza, who is like her foster mom.She also explains healing is a calling for her.He also learns that Porky and Lyza apparently go way back.

She also says that if we are ever out of the city, we could get her some ingredients.

On our way home from the bar, a kid runs out of an alley and pushes into Penelope, then runs away down a different alley.We decide to follow the kid but lose track of him.

We need to meet the girl and see the church.

< March 26, 2025 >

First thing in the morning, as we sit at a table eating breakfast, Antonio enters./u201cShe2019s gone, they took her, you have to find her./u201d00a0

He and Marita were going shopping at the market, near the Heights Market.They were supposed to meet at 8: 00 or so.When she didn2019t show, he ran by her house, which looked like people were in a frenzy.He then came here.

He takess to the merchant family mansion in the Heights(I19).Antonio lines at the Tanley house next door where he is a foster exchange noble.We tell Antonio to head to his house, and we will investigate.We walk past the Maggia mansion, the guards are on high alert.00a0

We make small talk, but they don2019t seem to want to admit anything is going on.We try to get them to lets in, but they don2019t want to be helpful.Martin notices a guard coming in from the house.Seems to be an officer.He claims there is no problem.We carry onp the street.

We call Antonio out, and suggest we go find the go-between, Agatha.(Agatha is an acquaintance of a halfling named Notia).00a0

Antonio describes anicorn necklace and medallion that shesually wears.With Eugene2019s help he makes a good description of it.

Martin casts Locate Object and gets a ping of something.It is in the Geronde family residence.It seems to be inside the residence.We send Antonio to look for clues and we go to talk to Lady Geronde about the soul trapping mirror as an excuse to get in.Turin notes that the grounds are pretty open, with a few trees and gardens and flower beds.South of the house is a walled garden.As we approach the house, Martin2019 spell fades, but he notes the object is likely on the second or third floor.

We knock on the door, and the maidservant asks what we can do to help.We ask to speak to Lady Geronde and she putss in a side room.Lady Roweena comes down, and we explain the life trapping mirror situation.She offered to let her take care of the mirror.We describe the creature and she is interested.She askss to drop it off in the morning.
