On te way out, Eugent tries to message Marita./u201cMarita, we are Antonio2019s friends, are you okay ?/u201d but gets no response.He tries again, same thing.

We go to Pirandello2019s Pastries, to Martin2019s chagrin.00a0 As it is lunchtime, the store is a little busy, but we wait.Eugene is entranced by the smells and buys many pastries.00a0

Eventually Martin gets Jillie2019s attention.00a0 It does not go well.00a0 Eventually Martin leaves the bracelet on the table and goes to leave and breaks through to Jillie and they makep, sort of.Martin also tells JIllie about Marita.Eugene makes a picture of Marita to show to her.She thinks she may have seen her but not recently.

We go to the Rose Garden Inn to see if we can find Agatha.Arada becomes Notia.Arada befriends an older halfling named Emilia who is charming.We all have lunch, but there is no sign of Agatha.00a0

While we are waiting.Penelope tellss about the swords that were given to her from her father2019s study.They are very nice swords.Penelope wants to keep them, but she ' s just a little freaked out.She would like to know who the friend is, but one step at a time.

Around 1:30 we head out and go back to Antonios and go into Tenley Manor. /u00a0 It is dark.Martin suggests he needs to tell his father.Antonio sends a servant to try to find him.In the meantime, he decides to tell his foster mother Stella Tanley what is happening.

She is a tall - ish rugged no - nonsense woman. /u00a0 Definitely an outdoors person. /u00a0

We sump the situation to his foster mom.  

We also explain about the necklace that is in Lady Roweena’s house. We also suggest that we could send a message to Marita through the wall. She suggests she could talk to Marita’s mother (Grilla), as they are neighbors and all. We told her we will come back tomorrow.
18 Patchwall 1150

Suddenly it is Earthday.

We talk to Porky who says we have been acting normal the past five days.We talk to Lyza and explains what is going on.She suggests talking to Thom.Thom says she heard from a person at theniversity that this has been experienced by a few people.Professor Gearhardt is the one to talk to of the Department of Chronology.He has beeen hanging out at the library.

Lyza says we were going to take the weekend to go investigate the lover ' s situation.We rent a cart and horse and a horse for Turin, and head east.

Towards the end of the day we get to the town we thing is Killwich.There is a rundown pub called the Wandering Griffon.Entering there are a few trestle tables and benches.The barkeep isnfriendly.We talk about the church and he says it is a bad place.It was a church to Mandos the god of Death, but it has been taken over by a group of strangers.The Innkeeper also says that his sister has gone missing, and would pay a reward if we could save her.

We head east, through fog and a rough track.

In the clearing we see a large church.On the front there are four stone statues of creatures with wings.We go around, there is a side building tucked beside the tower with a corridor connecting it to another side building.There are lights inside the church and the buildings.To the west side, there is a green glow coming from a window.We see flickering of shadows through the window, but it is hard to tell what it is.

It is about 40 feet from tower to tower, and 80 feet from front to back.

We head back to the inn.In the morning we go back.

We were patrolling the Heights when a woman frantically beggeds to chase the winged thing that took her baby "Billy". We got some horses and gave chase.

Part way there, we passed a narrow canyon opening and saw a bag that we all figured was an ambush.Sure enough, we were "ambushed"by 6 angry goblins.We quickly took care of them, though Eugene was knocked out by a goblin arrow.Martin healed him though.

We followed the baby and came to a canyon trail.We followed switchbacksp to a hill that needed to be climbed.We heard some strange noises as we made our wayp the hill which sounded like birds and some kind of canine.Turin looked in the nest and saw three griffon hatchlings and a small dog.Martin had guessed the baby was a dog.Eugene slept the baby griffons and we discussed what to do .We grabbed the dog and rode back to town.The woman gave a small polished agate in thanks.She said it will brings good luck.

EDIT: We later learned that the woman was @UUID[JournalEntry.k7iu07Lqyyzbim74]{Claudia de la Riis}

Evening of the 19th, we come back from patrol and hear(who we learn to be @UUID[JournalEntry.mRSylUJh3HRg8rPJ]{Mikyl Swiftsword})arguing with @UUID[JournalEntry.6rhQQUTdZ0ulQ0Y1]{ Lyza}. Mom and Dad are arguing abouts.

The next day we head back to Haven. On our way back, we are accosted by a man and a woman who ask if we are headed to Haven. They are Manykeor and Sarah, the head of Oakenville. They have a goblin problem and all their townfolk are off at Timberfloatn. While we discuss what to do, Turin follows them to help.

We spend the rest of the day on the road, headed south and camp rested and refreshed. As we trundle along, we come to a clearing with three goblins accosting a lumberjack. Eugene splats one, while Martin Sanctuaries the lumberjack. Turin kills another, and we kill the third.


We get to Oakenville.  


It is suggested we take Yuri to Elenya Silverbraid at the Temple. She is a half-elf priestess of Lohi. She starts fussing over him, She heals him, and takess to the Inn.  During the walk, we confirm the temple is open to all faiths, and she would be thrilled to have a wedding ceremony held at her temple.


Looking around the inn we see an assortment of townsfolk. Jocasta letss in the private room to talk with the leaders of the town. Mandyk, Bartholomeo (halfling) the village merchant,  Masha the herbalist (tiefling). There have always been goblins, but lately it has gotten worse. After a storm two months ago, many trees got knocked down and the goblins started coming out in force. The trees all seem to be pointed to a central spot.


Masha givess some healing potions for our journey. Yuri joinss. They fell towards a common point, even though they were all over the forest. Which just happens to be the new clearing. The goblins are coming from all over. 

We decide to get some sleep and explore in the morning. We also requested a map to the clearing.

As we go outside the gates, we find a servant type who seems to have been waiting fors. Master Tainley would like to meets. We follow him to the Tainley mansion.


We are escorted to thesual waiting area and are joined by Lord and Lady Tainley.


“I don’t know how to approach this subject, it is rather embarrassing”


Our daughter disappeared a while ago.  Back towards the beginning of the year, five months or so ago. Nobody saw her going away. She took some clothes and left. She’s lets know she wasn’t happy in her life and wanted to break away.”


“Stella felt we should let her be. And now with these other disappearances we don’t know.”


Eugene points out that there are some similarities but also some differences.


They want to at least know she is safe and happy.


As best as they can tell the letters are coming from Haven, but that could be through a courier.


 

Byelaya Tainley.


Her best friend was Cortina de la Riis (one of Harz and Claudia’s three children). 


If we find her, please pass along that we miss her, and hope she is safe and is welcome back home whenever she wants. Stella says to tell her that her brother calls her “Byebye”


We leave with another item for the stack.



We talk about how to start looking.  If Penelope was abducted, she would wait for an opening.  If Arada was trying to smuggle someone out she wouldn’tse the gate, she would go towards the river, probably Lombard to the docks. We also think Jillie would have have gone down Lombard to Nobles Way to the centaur taxis. 


Arada thinks there is annderstanding that the Hand is a bunch of quasi-independent groups working together.We don’t think they are in the Labyrinth or North Corridor.  Martin thinks it could be the docks.  Turin points out they could be hidden on a ship.


At the base of Lombard, Martin tries to Locate Object in the bracelet Martin gave to Jullie. They cover the area from the Heights to North Corridor and a second chance from the Commons to the South Docks, but nothing pings.


We decide to go back to the Griffon to plan for tomorrow and to wait for the head of Maggia security. Porky tells Arada there is a package for herp in her room.  While she checks that, Lyza says we need to talk, something bad has happened.


So it turns out we have caused some trouble. Swiftsword got wind of what is going on.  He says someone is accusings of kidnapping the girl. He’s planning on taking it to the council. We tell her as an aside we have talked to the Maggia family and their head of security is supposed to gives a debrief.


We also told Lyza that we think Jillie has also been abducted, though she is leery of that.


Georgio enters. We give him anpdate.


He tellss Marita was seen at Pierre’s for her hair appointment, and disappeared after that. She may have gone from there anywhere and gotten jumped. We discuss the case a bit. 


We discuss what to do for a while.  Scanning is an option, but it is limited. We discuss beating the bushes to check our networks to see if anyone has heard anything. 


We also show images of the Pirate lady and the tattooed man to Georgio to see if he recognizes them. We also ask if he’s talked to any of her friends. There was someone in the horse market. Agatha Ravenwood. It was Agatha all along. 


So the plan is to check the Dell for Jillie, scan part of the city tomorrow, check in with our networks, have Georgio find Agatha, and find the women.


Before bed, Martin, Eugene, Arada, and Penelope head to the Dell to see if Jillie made it. We make it to Jillie’s house on Hillandale. It is a traditional hillside with round doors. Jillie answers the door and wonders why we are there. She says she didn’t go to work because her mother is sick and she’s been looking after her all day.


Eugene is a little leery and casts detect thoughts on Jillie. Martin determines she has pneumonia or the medieval equivalent. Martin stays behind to heal her in the morning while the party goes back to the Griffon. 


When they get back to the Griffon, Arada asks Eugene to see if the vest she got as a package is magic.  It is, but he also knows it is beyond his abilities to identify.  Arada decides to try to attune to it anyhow with the caveat that if it eats her soul Penelope will punch her out.

Early afternoon


We head towards Caravan station. Along Gold Alley, Martin casts locate object to try to find a watchmaker’s vice.  He gets the group close to where he thinks one is, but the spell runs out.


Go to a nearby jewelry shop to ask if they know Olivia Chronosmith. The jeweler tellss that her shop is in an alley nearby.  We head there and find Olivia’s shop.


We enter.  It is a cramped, but functional workshop.


We explain that we think she is connected to the tower and is the last descendent of the tower’s constructor.


She is a bit shocked, and stunned that family history is real.


She is also surprised that we got into the tower and survived.

She mentions a music box that is the key to the tower. Which she still has. Martin remembers one of the books mentioned how the defense system was activated by music.


A flash comes out of the back room and makes a beeline toward Penelope.  Something small lands on her and starts tinkering with her armor. Arada sees a one foot tall winged sprite.


Olivia winds the music box. We hear a haunting but soothing melody.


Eugene shows her the medallion. We describe beep beep.  


We also describe the jumping in town, and she mentions that it sounds like wild chronology magic.


We describe what we need for the tower. She thinks the foundry might have the steel and the ironwood coal.  She isn’t sure about the emerald(s).


She also mentions there is a junkyard to the west of town somewhere.


She is going to read over night and we’ll see her in the morning.


We head back to the inn to report … in.


We tell LYza what we learned with the mayor and council, Gearhart, and Olivia Chronosmith.


Lyza remindss that Lucille is looking for some help with the murder dolls in the Labyrinth.


We scarf down dinner, and head to the Market Barracks. It is now 7:00


Lucille tellss the rumors are the dolls are between two and ten feet tall.  She says she’s heard all kinds of stories.  


She takess to where the alley where things are reported.  She tellss to expect a creep sensation and possibly fog out of nowhere.


The cobblestone alley is eerily quiet. There is a chill wind, and the smell of decay. A mist begins to form.Down a side alley, we can see shapes that seem … wrong. The sounds of whispering comes from the alley.


The map changes to combat mode.

Eugene detects necromantic magic.


Turin shoots at a doll near him and misses.  


A doll swings its doll at Eugene misses badly. As he had foreseen. It also misses with its second attack. Another doll misses Turin.


Marionettes come at our feet. Penelope switches places with Eugene and smacks it with her sword. Arada hops down and attacks the doll. 


Martin bonds Arada and Penelope, and Eugene casts a web to slow the ones at the end of the alley.


Turin shoots one of the ones at the end of the alley. 


A doll sings a creepy lullaby and frightens Penelope, Turin, and Arada. Martin tries to turn them, but it doesn’t work.  The far ones approach and try to attack Turin who runs in fear.


Penelope splats the one that was frightening Arada, and Arada runs back to sneak attack one.


Martin heals Turin and is frightened by one of the dolls. Turin critically hits the one in the middle causing it to collapse. Penelope and Arada shish kebab the third one, and Eugene finishes it off with a fire bolt.


We quickly finish off the last one, peppering it with arrows, rapiers, sacred flames, and fire. 


As we kill the last one, the creepiness doesn’t go away.

One of the buildings is marked “toy shop”.  Inside we see a time capsule of the macabre. Eugene detects magic. There is creepy glowing necromantic magic arounds, though nothing specific.


We decide to lock itp and come back another day.  On our way out of the Labyrinth, we let Lucille know that we’re only half done.


We let Lyza know, and go to sleep.

The next morning, the priestess mentions she heardsp and about last night.  We tell her nothing happened. Nobody broke in. Nobody got hurt because they were trying to break in.


Martin suggests passing on the message that part of the curse might be that violence against werewolves could cause the curse to come back. We don’t know that it doesn’t. Eugene wants to be logical.


After a while, Florimin comes back.  She says people seem to be buying the story, but they should still be careful.


But there is a commotion going on at the Georgeson mansion/town hall. She says she is headed across the street to see what is going on.  Martin and Penelope go with her. 


There are people standing around, and the door to the town hall seems to have been broken open from the outside. It looks like it has been shouldered open.


Florin asks why it is broken down. A guy comes from inside and says they are tired of not knowing what is going on so they decided to find out.  They did and he’s dead. In his sons room, just dead.


The three ofs go to the son’s room. Georgeson is curledp at the foot of the bed. Florin checks him and says he’s dead.


The body is cool to the touch and shows no signs of external injury. Florin goes to make some arrangements. Penelope brings the body over to the temple.


We hear the muttering about magic, werewolves, grief, etc.   We decide to take an hour to just look around to see if we can figure out what might have happened. In the residence side of the house, we find a few strange things. Toys strewn about, water dripped on a painting of the boy (which tastes vaguely salty). The boy’s bed is pristine, as if waiting for the boy to come home. 


The cupboard looksntouched, like he hasn’t been eating.  Eugene examines the body and finds nothing. 


With nothing else to do, we head out of town.



We spend a couple more days headingpriver to Oakridge where nothing eventful happens.


We eventually make it to the town of Oakridge mid-morning on the 25th. Down by the docks there are a couple cranes. There is a temple on the hill. Your basic town.


There is no market per se, but there are a few shops.


A shopkeeper askss if we are here for business or pleasure. Martin mentions we are here on adventurers business.  We are from Haven, we’re adventurers, we heard a rumor about a lost mine, dragon in it, thesual.


He says there is a mine and it is the source of a lot of the town’s wealth, but there were a lot of miners killed, and Mayor Taryon has ordered it lockedp. He suggests going to the inn if we want more information.


The inn is the basic wooden stone country inn. Ivy on the outside, wooden floors on the inside. Thesual crown on the inside.  There is a beefy boy behind the bar.

We order four ales and a wine, and some stew.  We also mention we’ve heard about some mine trouble. He says we should talk to Diggy the miner.


We approach Diggy.  He says we should talk to Cham who is next to him. So Martin turns to Cham and says that his acquaintance Diggy told him to talk to her.


Cham says the mayor opened the mine a few months ago, and there was a call for miners so the four of them heeded the call.  There was a monster in the mine that killed Jackie and the others.  It was a mess. They got out, and the mayor closed it off. This was a week or so ago.


None of them had seen the monster. They heard screams but saw nothing.  The monster made a basic roar. They were mining iron, but they heard rumors theresed to be gems in the mine.


If we want to help we should talk to Gingar Terion. He sometimes comes in for lunch, or we could go to his house out of town. Martin suggests Arada should negotiate our fee as she is better at haggling.


After a little while, a distinguished gentleman appears at the door and goes to the bar then retires into a side room. 


Cham wanders over and tellss that was the mayor. Arada gets on the table and introduces herself as the solution to all his problems.


He says he’s sent for a squad of soldiers. She says we’re here. She asks if we wants it solved or people to be pretty.


He says Theresia told him to get soldiers from Brighton.  Arada convinces him with the nat 20 Eugene foresaw.


He offers a bit of gold and treasure that “wouldn’t be minable” . I.e. treasure.


She also makes sure he’ll include supplies. Arada via Eugene also suggests adding the first five pounds of anything mineable. And our stay at the inn. He agrees and says after lunch he’d talk to the merchants and get the key.


A little after lunch the mayor comes back and tellss everything is arranged. The mine is a half days ridep the road.


We ride to the mine, with extra rope and supplies, and camp for our adventure in the morning.

The next day we head back to Haven. On our way back, we are accosted by a man and a woman who ask if we are headed to Haven. They are Manykeor and Sarah, the head of Oakenville. They have a goblin problem and all their townfolk are off at Timberfloatn. While we discuss what to do, Turin follows them to help.

We look for a place to stash the horses.Wenhitch them and tie them to the wagon, in hopefully an ogre free section of the map.

The west tower is about 20' tall and is in not too bad shape, and a second towerp a set of steps.In front of those is a well.We scout around a bit, peering over walls, thesual.

Oh goodie.Ogres.We see four of them.Two for Turin, One for Penelope, and Eugene, Arada, and Martin get the other one ?

Turin, Eugene, and Penelope combine to take the first ogre down.The other four start to swarm Penelope.Martin casts Heroism on her to make her a little more tanky.

Arada and Turin badly hurt one, and Eugene fire bolts a third.An ogre hits Penelope with a thundering smash, so Martin cures her a little.

Eugene dares an ogre to hit him, and it misses.Turin shoots it, and the party rallies around Penelope.Penelope downs another.Slowly we are whittling them down.Martin gets hurt by one, so Arada stabs it.Down to two ogres.Turin shoots.Down to one ogre.

Penelope stabs the last ogre with both swords, striking with both.A light glow emerges from the swords, healing her slightly.That's new … The last one swings are Arada and swishes, and Martinses the power of his god to finish it.

Two more ogres emerge from the cliff wall.Oh look, more targets.Arada runsp and stabs the closest, and retreats to stand on top of a dead ogre.Turin shoots it, treating it like a tall goblin.Eugene fire bolts it, and Penelope runsp to finish the job.She hits the other new ogre, and her swords heal her some more.Nice swords.

Two more ogres join the fray.Have an ogre, leave and ogre.Need an ogre, take an ogre.

Arada stabs one, severely wounding it.Eugene shoots it again.Penelope disengages to back away so Martin can heal her.

The ogres are trying to swarm Arana and Eugene, but it isn't working for them.Turin kills the one in front of Eugene, leaving one ogre left.Penelope whacks it hard, healing slightly.She also distracts it.Martin intimidates the ogre who threatens to attack him.It misses, and Arada finishes it off.We loot the bodies for a grand total of fuck all.

We find a bunch of overgrowth, and an opening into the cave.We take a quick rest before going into the cave.Andreas tries to convince his friends to come out.They don't trust the situation and swear to not come out.

After we've rested, we enter the cave, Turin leading the way.

The entrance area seems to lead to a large manor.It is a mess after a near century of misuse.There are some faded murals, depicting some knights looking over a battle between humans and elves.

Eugene investigates the part of the mural that looks like a pile of bodies of elves.Something isn't right, and he realizes one of the dead elves eyes are two holes and calls Arada over.Eugene tries to search his history knowledge.He recalls something about an ancient elven family who were slaughtered long ago.He thinks the name “Erde ” is relevant, but doesn't recall how.

Arada thinks the hole is a secret mechanism, and goes to put her fingers in.Eugene suggests maybe getting a human(Penelope)to do it, but she pulls anyway.A section of wall opensp revealing a door into another room.

It looks like a trophy room, and has more information.The race of elves were the Kale, and this is a trophy from the Erde family.There are four suits of fine elven plate mail, and a few replicas.Some of the plate might be serviceable, and it might be of value back in Haven.

We also find another door out.With another ogre.It looks like a meeting room, with a fire pit and ogre sized chairs.It hits Arada once, but otherwise dies quickly.

Hanging over the fire is a “tea ” like substance, and a pair of doors leading to the west, south, and east.As we go west, there is a bit of slope down, with more junk and broken furniture.There are also a couple alcoves to the north and south.

As Eugene moves to part of the room, he hears a loud whoosh and a whistling sound.Poison gas fills the room.Arada and Eugene fallnconscious.Martin tries to wake herp, and after a few minutes manages to do so.Eugene also wakesp.

Arada figures that there is a line beyond which there is a pressure plate.She isn't sure if it resets, or how far it extends.Arada leaps over and sees where it extends.We need to jump ten feet.Martin is screwed.

Penelope piggy back carries Martin over, since his long jump is 8 feet.To the west is a north-south corridor with stairs going down north and more doors to the south.

Eugene finds a giant shrine that has seen hundreds of years of disuse.

We find more stairs and a door.Arada listens at the door and checks for traps.Behind the door is a large pile of furniture.Penelope and Turin push their way through.In the middle of the room is a burnt pile of debris from a recent campfire.There is a storage room off to the side, and a doorp a small set of stairs.She hears soft growls on the other side.

Arada and Turin peek inside and see what appear to be seven wolves chained to a wall.Turin talks with them.

Who chained youp ? Bosses ?

Who are bosses ? “Ogres ”

Many bosses ? Lots.

Did they capture you and chain youp ? Yes-work for bosses

What kind of work ? Hunt, kill, protect ?

Would you work fors ? Why ?

So we don't kill you ? Seven ofs, one of you.

They lunge forward.

The wolves seem to be able to break free.A few get close, but spike trap does a lot of damage.Sleep puts a lot of wolves to sleep.

We follow a hallway that slopes down.It seems to be a storage room, with a bunch of shattered barrels.

In the middle of the round room, there is a well, which makes sense if it was a water source for a siege.Turin finds more ogres.

This is a lot more than eight ogres.

Maybe the dwarves were smart to wait this out.

We plow through the ogres.

This is a former storage room which has been converted to a sleeping area for the three ogres we just killed.

Searching around we find :

10, 000 copper pieces

1, 000 gold pieces

4 gems(~250 gp each)

A barrel containing dwarf parts

A few barrels of fresh water

A keg of ale

2 dozen sheep skins

A pile of lumber

We take the gold and the gems and decide to pull the rest outside and camp for the night.
Earthday is payday in the City Watch.Regular guards are paid 12 gold crowns/week

journals.name: Second floor, same as before.A little bit louder and a little bit more ogre filled.

text.content:
Dawn breaks.Nothing exciting seems to have happened overnight.We need to wrap thisp by the afternoon if we want to catchp with the barge.Over breakfast, Eugene looks to identify Arada's vest.He can tell it is imbued with very powerful conjuring magic, but it is hard to tell.They discuss how Arada hassed it in the past.

We ask Andreas to watch the horses, and to stay safe, but also to guard them with his life.He points out those two things are mutually exclusive.

We discuss exploring one of the towers before we go back into the manor, just so we don't get surprised from behind.The roof is gone, but it looks like it would provide shelter from the wind, and be a good place to light a campfire that wouldn't be seen.We find a large wheel of cheese, and a jug of something that seems like coarse flour.Martin tastes it, and it seems to be a mixture of flour and ground bone.We take the cheese, and leave the boneflour.Except a tiny pouch Eugene takes.

We go back to the manor to pickp where we left off …

We find a room off a hallway we didn't go down before.It looks like a shrine of worship that has been turned into living space.There are three segments to the room.Built in benches are part of it.To the west is a pulpit, and to the south are stairs that gop.On the pulpit, Turin notices the pages of the book are turning by themselves.

Arada finds herself in a T intersection.To the west it opens into a larger room with tables and chairs.To the east she sees it opens into another large room and she hears heavy breathing.She comes back to the group.

Meanwhile in a room halfwayp a set of stairs, Eugene sees an ogre.A really big ogre.Turin closes and grabs the book.He hears an angry squeak from nearby.He sees a small and demonic thing, so he shoots it.

Eugene webs the ogre into place.We'll see if it works.It does not.

The ogre comes in and swings it's great staff and bashes Penelope.Penelope bashes it back.Her sword glows softly and it heals her.Turin fires three arrows, hitting it three times.Arada runs in, but misses.Martinses sacred flame, and the ogre falls down.Eugene looks at the staff, and it appears there are magical charms hanging on it.

There is a shrine for the old family, and candles decorated with dwarf entrails.Under the bed, we find a trunk.In it is 1000 gold which we split betweens.

Turin gives the book to Martin.It is a Tome of Cruel Lies, which makes curses more powerful.

Eugene also gets a wand that allows him to detect magic.Heses it and notices the book is faintly magic, the charms on the greatstaff are magic, and nothing else seems to be.

We go back to the hallway Arada was at before.Martin thinks there are two of them.Arada runsp and smacks one, and runs back.Martin calls forth his spirit guardians, and an ogre throws a javelin at Arada.

Eugeneses his new-ish wand of wonder on the ogre.And a fireball erupts, centered on the ogre, but catching Arada too.

Turin shoots the singed ogre, and Penelope runsp to hit it, killing it.Another ogre runsp to join the fray.Turin and Penelope take this one out.

More ogres appear.We need to burn the spawn nest or something.

Martin runsp andses his channel divinity to heal Penelope and Arada.

We keep blasting to try to whittle them down a little bit.We kill two, but more ogres spawn.The ogres really don't like spirit guardians, so they try to hit Martin but miss.Penelope and Arada kill off the last two.

We look around the room we were in.They appear to be fancy quarters for an ogre.One ogre had a few coins.Obviously the leader.

We explore a couple more rooms.Turin finds a room thatsed to be living quarters, but is now a bar.There is basic furniture and a few casks.There is a door to the side which appears to be a storage area.He rummages and finds a warhammer.

We head downstairs …

We get to the landing of a lower floor.We see a troll.Oh goodie.

Arada misses the troll, but Turin shoots it.He really hits it.But the troll heals itself.Penelope slices it deeply and Eugene's fire bolt misses.Turin's arrow kills it though.

We explore to the east.The first room has a door on the other side that has been smashed, with blood trails leading off.We follow the blood to a pile of treasure!Just kidding, it's more ogres.

Eugene's magic wand fires a lightning bold singing Penelope.Arada runsp and stabs it.

Another ogre spawns and slams Penelope, but Turin puts an arrow through its head, dropping it instantly.Eugene webs the area to be safe, and Martin runsp to heal Penelope.

There is another ogre in the web, whom Arada runsp to stab and run back.A couple rounds of this and the ogre dies.

Looking past the web, it looks like the ogres were moving rubble to clear a path.

Arada goesp to the stairs, but it looks like they are blocked.Maybe if we had some miners we could get through, but where are we going to find a bunch of dwarven miners ?

journals.name: Shooting earth elementals in a barrel.

text.content:
Turin and Penelope search the next corridor but find nothing. We keep exploring, and Eugene sees another flail snail. Turin runsp and shoots it, and Arada stabs it and runs away. The snail runsp to flail at Arada knocking her out. Eugene drags her back and Martin heals her,  killing the snail with his Spirit Guardians.


Looking down the hallway, we see a large vaguely humanoid shambling thing that appears to be made out of dirt and rock. 


Turin decides to shoot it, doing some damage.  We think.  Eugene webs the room it is in. Arada shoots it with her bow, and Martin briefly puts it into his glowy death circle. The creature gets stuck in the web, givings a chance to shoot it like a fish in a barrel. 


Turns out really nasty monsters who spend the entire fight restrained are not as tough as they ought to be.


We investigate the room, that looks like itsed to be a torture chamber which has been converted into a summoning circle.  There is a dead body to the side wearing robes. It appears to be the summoner. The body has a spellbook and components for summoning elementals.


The body looks familiar tos. We recognize him from the competition. The formerly dead rust monster summoner.  The mystery deepens.


We go to the remaining door which is locked. There is no sound coming from the other side. Arada opens it, and there seems to be another small corridor and locked door which Arada alsonlocks. Inside is annconscious Lyza.  Martinses the last of his healing to try to get people toppedp, including Lyza who isnconscious on the floor. It seems to be a room to hold a slightly more valuable prisoner.


We can probably carry Lyza out, especially since she doesn’t have her armor or weapons. Penelope carries Lyza so Turin can keep his hands free if we need.  On the way out, we also check the summoning circle to make sure it is disturbed. Eugene does a sweep and doesn’t find anything magical. 


We go back to where we left the ship captain who is not here. We discover a trap door we did not see before. We open it and see a ladder going down. At the bottom is a passageway leading off in some direction. Our best guess is this passage goes south. 


We follow the tunnel, which appears to be rough hewn and put here for a purpose. It goes quite a ways. Turin finds a new set of fresh tracks (probably the ship captain). After maybe 400 feet or so we find another ladder goingp. Arada climbsp and finds herself in a small cave where the far end is covered in brush and shrubbery. We exit through the opening. The elves think they can see Gallows Hill to the south ofs. We are outside the city wall.


Nears is a cart and a horse. The horse looks like a good strong draft horse, and the cart is in good shape. Turinses a spell to talk to the horse. The horse says a big guy brought him out and left him there. We assume it is help from Arada' s friends.


We put our tabards back on and take the horse and go towards Horse Gate.00a0 We get backnchallenged and the guards lets in with a weird look.It is around 2am, so the cart bridges are closed but we could get back to the Griffon on foot.00a0


We leave the cart at the Southbridge barracks, and go across the pedestrian bridge.00a0 We don2019t think we are being tailed as we return to the Griffon.00a0


We get Thom to look at Lyza.She goes into ger2018er done mode and sends Turin and Penelope to get the spare bed and take it to Thom2019s lab.00a0 The rest ofs carry Lyza down.And for the first time we get to see Thom2019s lab.We get Lyza settled in as Thom tries to figure out what has happened.00a0


We get her settled, and gop to rest.

We discuss what to do .00a0 Arada thinks the Guild would know where Swiftsword hung out.We should return the cart, repair the griffon, investigate Swiftsword2019s house, investigate the Tower, or go shopping.

We decide to go shopping.

We go to Southbridge Barracks to get the horse and cart and take it to the Guild.They said they took it to Paddy2019s Wagons, so we go there.It is a wainwright, and we see the wagon we found last night.They gives the wagon, but they don2019t have the horse.So we go back to the barracks to ask about the horse.They don2019t know, but will ask when last night 's desk Sergeant gets back.

So back across the bridge to the Mint Barracks, to ask them about the other wagon and horses. They said that nobody claimed it, so they took it to Ironhoof Stables.  They gives a chit, and we go there.

So we go to Ironhoof Stables which is just outside Copper Gate.  It is a fairly large fenced in area with a pair of stables, small smithy, and a paddock out back.  

We meet the guy in charge. He and Turin talk horses a bit. We also give the wagon paperwork to him and he tellss the draft horses are out back. He says he can hook Turinp for 80 gp or so, plus the cost of tack.  

A stablehand brings out a bay for Turin to try out. Martin thinks it is a decent horse, and Turin casts speak with animals and it seems to be a content horse. The second horse is a little smaller, but also a good, slightly above average horse. Turin goes with the bay named “Ace” and tack and a military saddle.

Arada talks him down to 77gp for the package. We also buy a week' s worth of feed for all three horses.Martin suggests calling the two draft horses/u201chorse one/u201d and/u201csassafras/u201d.

We head back to the Griffon andnload the cart and stable the three horses and Turin gives Torik the quick/u201chow to take care of horses/u201d instructions.

We take one of the draft horses to get the other wagon and take it back.Arada and Penelope take the cart back.Arada talks to the Guild and they say they will get her a packet of information about Swiftsword.00a0 And that they didn2019t leaves a cart and horse.

With all the travelling, it is suppertime, so we go back to the inn for dinner and park our other cart and horse one.00a0

Porky says we had a messenger from one of the noble houses who left a heavy box that clinked.We take itpstairs to look through it.Penelope carries it and Arada and Eugene look for traps.00a0 We see on it the crest of the Maggia family.

Arada opens it, and inside there is a lot of gold and platinum and a note in an envelope on top.The note says

/u201cConsider this part reward and part downpayment-GM/u201d

There is about 1800 gp in gold and platinum.Martin says that a 300gp diamond for Revivify would beseful and Eugene would like a component for Clairvoyance.(which we acquire offline).Arada also shows her bracelet that she stole to Eugene and best they can tell it is/u201cvery rare/u201d

Eugene also identifies the magic armor that came off the dead wizard.It is a replica of true plate made of paper.It is/u201cscroll plate/u201d which is sort of mage armor in armor form, but has some cool side effects.00a0


Before bed Martin cast Sending and sent a message to "GM"(merchant guy whose name Paul is blanking on at the moment)."We received the generous reward you provided and are most grateful.You may also want to talk to Lord de la Riis.Things got complicated."(Martin had told the party he was going to let him know we received the chest.)The reply was: "already spoke to him.you have done a good thing today "

In the morning we head north, and it is pretty easy to follow the tracks.

Getting closer, we hear it is a reasonable sized camp judging from the sounds.We can see through the trees a semi permanent camp.

There is a quasi effective palisade and three guard towers and walkways around thepper level.

Turin finds a place out of the way to tiep Ace.

To the north is a rock that may give a good vantage.Naturally Arada climbsp to have a better look.Eugene messages her to see what she sees.She sees five but sure there are a fair number more.

Turin suggests doing a recon of the whole camp, so he climbsp to where Arada is.Arada asks if he can take out the one at the top of the tower.He says yes, but first wants to check with the group.

Martin says he can bond Turin and Arada if they want to pick off the strays.

We look to see if we can block off the big tent to keep them inside.Turin also says he could cast spike growth.

Martin casts emboldening bond on Turin, Arada, and Penelope and Turin and Arada go to try snipe the tower archers.

Turin takes out the one in the closest tower.He and Arada work their way around to the next tower and take out the second one.Arada sneaks ahead and waves Turin forward.They see a goblin at ground level looking the other way, so Turin crosses over and shoots at guard number 3 taking him out.That guard falls on the platform though, but there is no reaction from inside.

Arada wants to take out the ground level guard, but Turin pragmatically wants to stick to the plan.

They return to the party.

Turin suggests a two pronged attack.He and Arada will go to the rock and Penelope, Martin, and Eugene will go through the gate.Eugene messages as long as he can before we are out of range.

Turin looks for an isolated target but doesn2019t see any so they try to pick off a couple close ones.Turin gets two and Arada hits one but doesn2019t down it.Combat starts.

Eugene webs an area while the goblins rush out.Turin downs a goblin and takes a shot at the big dude, the Black Pimp.We don2019t name em, we just shoot em.Turin hurts him badly.

Martin kills one with sacred flame and Penelope kills one with her crossbow.

Eugene sleeps a bunch of them and Turin picks off a couple more, including the Black Pimp.Arada gets hit and explodes it in retribution.Martin downs a goblin with sacred flame with the assist from Eugene and Penelope runs in after another one.Eugene sleeps some more, but this is going too well.Something is bound to go wrong.

Nothing goes wrong.

We search the loot, but we basically find junk.We find some dubious rations that we collect for the bear.Otherwise we trash the camp so the next bunch of goblins can2019tse it.For future reference, the tribal insignia matches the ones at the bear cave.

Overall we find 12 gold, 7 silver, 42 copper coins, and a lump of basalt-encased gold ore worth around 20 gold.

So, we go back to tell the bear the stabby things are dead and won2019t bother him anymore.

Turin tells him the stabby things are dead and they shouldn2019t bother him and we brought some food.The bear is happy and won2019t hurt the hag as long as the stabby things are gone.

We debrief @UUID[JournalEntry.6rhQQUTdZ0ulQ0Y1]{ Lyza } .She wants to know if Arada knows anything about the Hand.

We also told her that Penelope needs new chainmail.Lyza says we should go to the Heights and talk to @UUID[JournalEntry.y9nknEVgST3BQ0Mb]{ Kelvar the Armorer } .

We also told her about the side job offer.With the meeting at Dhum 's Rhooms. She says we should go, not commit to anything and report back.

We also tell her about @UUID[JournalEntry.4pk1PyuDgUzhhqwZ]{Lucille} and her new status as an irregular irregular.

The day before we did some shopping. We bought a pearl.

The day of the event we go to the Trademaster' s Square, where we wait for a long time.We are in with a group of other adventurers in the Hall of All Guilds, who all are waiting their turn.It is a mixed bag.Turin heard a familiar female voice, but couldn 't locate the speaker.

We had our choice of six different items, fish, stones, parchment, a d8, a broken key, and some salt. We were told to only take one each but Arada took two!

There were many puzzle rooms, gather three keys and open a door, solve a puzzle with an owl bear, pick out the right door (we picked a tree. Shouldn' t have picked the tree), and solve a logic puzzle.

We endedp third, which was the best result for a guard team in years.The winning team was called the Enigma.A red headed woman, a wizard with a yellow beard, and a heavily tattooed man.

At the celebration, Arada heard the voice of the captain from the Nightmare-it was the read head from The Enigma!Dun dun dun.

journals.name: The Irregulars Get an Important Message

text.content:
Martin asks the Sergeant if he has a couple guards who are particularly bad gossips, and if so could they be on the crew that helps cleanp the basement.And it would be a shame < wink > if they spread rumors about how Adrelle isn2019t so awesome and is running a slavery ring from her basement.Time to take her reputation down a peg.

The next morning2026

Turin and Martin wakep and go to Summ Plaza.Martin casts Locate Object to find the stone he had given Torik.It is a dense wood, but moderately passable.Given that the Elves who live in the woods don2019t like non-elves, Turin goes in alone and Martin waits.

At the Griffon, Eugene goes downstairs to see if there are more potions.00a0 There is another one(TP1), yay!It is red in color with gel chunks floating in it.It smells like wine.

As Turin gets close, a couple Elves ask what he2019s doing.Turin explains he2019s looking for someone and they say that sounds like the kid we2019re missing.They melt back into the woods and Turin gets closer.Eventually he calls out to Turok who responds and looks bedraggled.They return to Martin and we all go to the Griffon.

They grab a couple to go breakfast sandwiches to go.We discuss plans.Martin suggests talking to the nobles might be a good start.We also have the log-book as evidence.Penelope points out that we are good with them as long as their interests are aligned with ours.00a0

We walk towards the Heights with Arada following at a distance to see if we are being watched.00a0

As we get to North Caravan Street, we hear a couple horses steam as if startled and charge towardss.Turin and Penelope go to help a mother and their child.Turin picks the childp.Penelope grabs the mom who is frozen in panic.Penelope drags her to the side.Eugene sleeps one of the horses and physics starts to happen.The left horse falls causing the second horse to stumble.The wagon lurches and rolls, spilling several barrels, one of which lands on Martin.00a0

Martin getsp and tries to calm the horse down.Penelope and Turin reunite mom and child, and Eugene sleeps the other horse.Martin heals the most dangerous of its injuries.We start cleaning stuffp, curious why nobody has come to claim the wagon.On the side are the faded words/u201cC...ransport Company/u201d.Sadly there is no bill of lading.Turin realizes one of the barrels/u201cbroke open/u201d and seems to be flour.

Turin tries to track it back to Stone Bridge.He sees where they got startled, but there is nothing there now.We take it to Mint Station.Eugene puts in a secondary claim that if nobody showsp to take it, we want it.

We head back to the Heights again.Martin and Penelope have a casual conversation about the benefits of being a caravan guard.

We get to the Maggia household and are let in.00a0 We find Gilberto is there but the others are not.We fill him in on our findings and suspicions.And the fact that Lyza is missing, and we believe Swiftsword may be involved.

He says that it would beseful to know how the guilds feel abouts and what we are doing.He offers to talk to the other guild masters.He also says we should talk to Tenley.He will arrange a meeting with Hars de la Riis.He also asks how much we make, which gets a wide range of opinions, but factually 12 gold a week which he feels is too little.Eugene points out that too little makes it too easy to bribe a Watch.Which leads to a discussion between Penelope and Arada about if they are supposed to take bribes.

Next we go to Tenley2019s.But we hear a voice behinds, and we see runningp tos breathless Aline the maid from the Griffon.Eventually we calm her down.Normally she is soft spoken, but he is rambling a fair bit.00a0 Porky says we have to come back to the Griffon right away.00a0

Eugene casts detect thoughts and sees that her mind is a whirlwind of thoughts.He goes a bit deeper and she is relieved she did a good job findings.00a0

We figure it is either a trap or that Porky has learned where Lyza is and head back immediately after stopping for pastries.Arada goes ahead and has a few minutes lead ons, figuring her natural dexyness will save her if it is a trap.Nobody is in the front room, where Porkysually is.00a0 Mrs Clever is in the kitchen.00a0

She finds Porky and he says he thinks he knows where Lyza is, in thendercroft of the Grey Halls, which is the main prison.This is where they put people they want to disappear.

Eugene messages Arada who says it is safe to come in.

Porky fillss in.He has a contact inside the jail.This contact has also heard rumors that bad things are happening down there, strange noises, thesual.

Things we know about thendercroft : It is the part of the prison where they put someone who they want to disappear.

Things we have heard : There is a hidden entrance from the outside.00a0

Arada thinks maybe the Guild would know where the entrance is.We hang out at a nearby tavern, the Green Griffon(no relation)while Arada goes to the Blue Moon Tavern(guild HQ).

Arada tells the person on duty that she needs to get into thendercroft.The contact thinks she will be able to do that but needs an hour.Arada also arranged for a few people who resembles to be there.

The Grey Halls is an old fortress that has been converted into a prison.There is one entrance designed to be hard to get through.There are four floors, and a basement, and somewhere below that is thendercroft.

While we wait, we levelp.

We head back to town and get there mid-day and head to the inn.Walking in, we see the basic assembly of people, including the barkeep and miners.

There are a couple people we don2019t know, who look like a farmer and a priestess.

The mayor is sitting with annknown woman.

As we enter, one of the miners jumpsp who we met before(Cham Clowder).Is the mine open ?/u201cWell, we have good news and bad news.The mine i open, but there is a large wolf prowling outside, and there are a lot of dead bodies to have to clean out, and we also found anntapped gold vein.u201d

They brings ale and food as we sit down to fill them in.

We also ask if they know a Trench Foast.They dont seem to.

The mayor2019s wife ? Asks if we saw anyone inside.

Eugene gives the rundown.Martin adds the well dressed hermit is dead.She asks if we are sure he is dead.Martin asks if her name starts with a T, she says yes, Theresia

Martin notices the Mayor looks sad for some reason.Penelope sees something in Theresia2019s face when Eugene shows him the minor illusion of the hermit.She walks away.

The mayor seems happy that they can get back to work.They asks if we found anything.Eugene says we found some materials within our one pound limit and produces a bag.

We give the key back to the mayor and hurries over to see his wife.

The miners ask if they can go back to work.We tell them about the giant spiders and the gold vein back there.We also mention the new opening that leads to what looks like a dungeon, so they may want to seal it off.Or explore it.Or charge adventurers to explore it.

Turin sees the mayor and Theresia in a heated discussion.They both seem pissed about something.

We also explain how to sell fake maps to draw adventurers in.Rico comes and givess food and drink.

Eugene asks the mayor if they have a town militia who needs supplies(the swords we found).He says not really, the townfolk manage what they can bring.Also the wife headspstairs.

As that conversation winds down, the farmer comes over and asks if we can help.He says his name is Thomas and he has a farm out of town.His sons have fallen ill, and he thinks it is more than an illness, maybe a curse.The priestess says she is pretty sure this is true.

He says there is a hag nearby, and the boys wander.He is afraid the boys may have bothered her and she cursed them.The priestess(Lenita, who looks somewhat otherworldly, like she came from across the sea)says ah, a fellow priest, that she follows Ariel, the deity of love and the arts.

She says she has seen Thomases sons and she believes it is not a normal disease.She saw them yesterday.Eugene asks if they have seen tracks.Martin asks if she has tried to remove curse, she says her goddess doesn2019t really go that way, but she2019s tried and no luck.

Eugene asks if she is an old woman who lives alone or a hag hag.And if she has seen something like the wolf orndeadnicorn tracks.

Turin also asks the mayor if there is a barge we could take downriver.He thinks we could find something but it would take a couple days.If we did that, Turin thinks we would save a day or two over the course of the journey since it would be downriver.

Martin asks if there is a blacksmith in town and if there is a jeweler.Smith, yes, jeweler no.There is a clothier though.

After lunch we head to Thomas2019 farm which takes an hour or so.It looks like a reasonable farm.He has some cows, probably for dairy and a little beef.We go into a nice enough farmhouse.He takess to see the boys, Barney(9)and Fred(12).

Neither boy looks healthy at all.They look like they are in restless sleep, maybe not in pain, but achy at least.

Martin gives them a look over, and casts lesser restoration on Fred.It has a minor effect and allows him to sleep more restfully.Martin casts the same thing on Barney.Eugene casts detect magic, which does seem to show a magical effect on them of some sort.Probably related to the curse.An augury also suggests seeing the hag is a good idea.

Thomas givess the directions to the hag's house, but tellss we won't be able to take the wagon, though maybe we could take a horse.Turin decides to bring Ace.

As we are leaving, Lenita comesp tos and says, since you are goingp there anyhow, could you do me a favor ? In her clearing, there is an herbal garden with a flower(sunstone creeper)that she needs for an alchemical potion.If we can get one, she would appreciate it.

We follow the path that was described, Turin in front, Penelope in back, Arada doing loops around the party and Martin keeping an eye out.

We approach a colorful scene that looks like something out of the Feywild.

We see across the circle an older woman flanked by a pair of wolves.

She asks what we are doing, and Martin says we were seeking the lady of the clearing because two boys have taken ill with a supernatural ailment and we2019ve heard that in her expertise we2019ve heard she might have knowledge that could help cure them.

She(Ludmilla)invitess closer.The wolves Bonemeal and Toothache lick their chops.

Eugene asks if she minds if she casts spells because he is going to cast something to make sure something tell the truth.She takes offense at this.

She says she has seen the boys, they interrupted her, and they deserve what they got.

She says she might be able to be persuaded to provide a cure if we can help with a bear problem she has.Penelope is pretty sure all this is going to end withs shaving a yak.

Old Great Black has finally lost his mind, killing everything in sight.If we do this, she says she can probably find a cure.If we go now, we might be there by early night, call it 8pm.She givess basic instructions towards the west.Arada points out that if we stay, she could sneak out and look for the flower.

We head out.As we leave her lair, Martin picksp a rock, studies it, and drops it again for future locate object purposes.

We head west.The wolves follow along withs.

Around sunset we come to a clearing in the woods.Arada climbs on top of a rock.She says/u201cguys, the bear is over there.”

Turin ties off Ace, and heads around the rock, casting speak with animals.Martin bonds Turin, Arada, and Penelope.

He growls to teh bear/u201cwe come in peace, are you okay ” “it hurts, everything hurts.They come and hurt/u201d

/u201cWho is they ? ”“Little things, pebbly ”

“Smaller than me ” “yes ”

/u201cSmaller than her on the rock/u201d/u201cno2026 stabby things/u201d

/u201cWhen do they come ?/u201d /u201c

Turin gets anger and fear

/u201cIf we took away your pain, will you hurts ?/u201d/u201cno/u201d

Turin believes him.

Martin walksp and casts cure wounds on the bear a couple times.He also give chin scritches.

Turin asks about the stabby things, and he says he killed some(pointing to corpses).

Turin asks where the stabby things come from, and the bear indicates that way.

Turin says now that we2019ve helped him, will he no longer hurt the old lady.He says he only hurts when the stabby things hurts him.

/u201cIs it okay if we spend the night here and go hunt the stabby things in the morning/u201d/u201cstay here, go morning/u201d

Turin also looks at the dead goblin stabby things to see if he recognizes any tribal patches.They are the tribe endemic to the Khuz mountains.

Martin sends a message to Lyza/u201cWe found the gems, we2019re hunting some goblins for the bear so the hag will cure the sick kids/u201d.u201cBlink blink2026 I2019m sure that makes sense in context/u201d

He then sends one to Olivia/u201cWe have the gems, how many do we need and can you tell Jillie at the pastry store Martin and his friends are okay/u201d/u201c3-4 pounds, and I can go get pastry/u201d

We think that betweens we have enough.

The night passesneventfully

We are patrolling near the docks at night.We heard a crash and saw a wooden ship that had crashed into the jetty.The dockmaster, indicated that he heard the crash, but we see no people.The ship is called the Nightmare.Penelope remembers a rumor "Did you hear about the ship that was lost at sea, The Nightmare ? They say that it was carrying a fortune in gold and jewels now everyone is looking for the wreckage."

We told the dockmaster to stay back and if he sees guards, to have them setp a perimeter.We started exploring the ship.The ship is eerily quiet.Fortunately Turin is familiar with ships, so he is able to lead things.

On the back, looking at the steering wheel, we saw blood where something had been dragged.Moving to the front of the ship, we saw what Penelope identified as ballista.There is no shrine to Nenya, the goddess of the sea, which isnusual.

The captain 's quarters are luxurious, but normal. Arada tries to open the sea chest. It is filled with women' s clothing.Is the captain a woman ?

The front of the ship is the officer 's mess. There is an overturned inkwell that has dried on a map. The meal is cold, but not rotten. It looks like they were interrupted mid-meal.

We go to explore down below. It reeks of death and decay. Flies, stench. Penelope hurls at the stench. Martin ritually casts Detect disease while Eugene makes some masks. The crew cabin in the front lower deck looks like it is a massacre scene. Hard to tell if people lost them in a fight or before the fight. Penelope found a severed arm.

We explore the back. More signs of combat around the officer quarters. We find a rat body with a large bite out of it.

We open the hatch to the hold. The stench is worse. Martin tosses a torch down. Arada suggests we tie a rope to her so Penelope can pull herp if needed. Arada goes down and sees six bodies and lots of blood.

Against better judgement, we do down into the hatch and find ghouls. Combat ensues. One ghoul is quickly dispatched, but another gets the drop on Turin and paralyzes him.

The captain of the ship closed the hatch ons, and wantss to leave. We search the hold and are sure there is nothing there. We agree to leave.

As we leave, @UUID[JournalEntry.4pk1PyuDgUzhhqwZ]{Lucille Rilossa} (Our guard friend from the other day) runsp and then agrees to go get help. We see the captain on the deck jump off the far side. With nothing left to do, we return to the Giggling Griffon to fill in Captain Lyza.

We wake in the morning and decide to head to the church. We discuss if we need a cover story but the truth will suffice. As we wander north of the village, the closer we get to where the church would be, it gets foggier. Turin detects that we are being followed. Possible two two legged things, or one four legged thing, or an eight legged thing walking on its hind legs.

It realizes it has been spotted and fades into the mist, but we can tell it is pacings.Eventually the fog clears and we come to the church.Arada and Martin go to look in the windows.Peeking in the window of the building on the east, we see a bedroom, cupboard, and person seated at a desk.Further on is a blue stained glass window we can ' t see through.There are more windows on the back, and side.Martin thinks there is an evil presence.Martin continues to sense evil through the windows.The gargoyle statues also ping evil.Martin also is pretty sure the church is still consecrated.

One of the gargoyles comes in looking menacing.We attack it, doing some damage, but they are tough.Hits from the group smashes it to pieces.We keep an eye on the others as Penelope knocks on the door.

The front doors are 12 foot tall ironwood doors.As we approach, we feel a shiver of cold.There is no answer, so we enter.We hear chanting from the inside of the church, and the doors close behinds.We are attacked by rats.Big rats but notnusually large rats.Turin notices that the rat ' s eyes are totally blank.Suddenly Penelope loses the ability to speak, as if a magical electric field called Discord is borked.When she smashes the rat, she can speak again.

We go in, and see a couple nuns who are chanting.Turn is overtaken by the chanting and prostrates himself on the ground.The nuns move to attack.

Eugeneses his first ever second level spell to web the area.Martin puts a sanctuary around Turin and goes to shield.The nuns are attacking anyway.Turin snaps out of it.We are trying to stop the nuns.After a bit of combat, an older woman at the front says she will take care of this.Martin tries to calm emotions.One of the nuns seem confused as to what is going on.We down all the nuns, to several of our chagrins.

The old woman at the front is still mad ats.Eugene tries to sleep her but she shrugs it off.Penelope tries to subdue her, she dodges it.She casts a spell hurting Penelope badly.Eugene endsp killing her.

To our left we see a ghost, on top of a glowing sigil.It approachess.Penelope swings, but her sword goes right through it.Turin ' s hunter ' s mark does mild damage.The ghost attacks Martin but misses.Arada tries to distract the ghost, since it seems only magic hurts it.Fortunately Eugene has magic and splats it.

On the body, Martin finds a symbol of Mandos that has been corrupted.She also has a dagger that gives off a dark aura of necrotic energy that is obvious to all.Eugene searches a desk and finds a couple books.Two appear to be from a set of books containing treatises on how to reanimate a body.Turin finds a not so secret door near the altar.On it is a dagger and some candles.Possibly with some dried blood.Behind the altar is a leather book that gives off a weird vibe.Penelope notices the glowing sigil is still glowing.Martin gives Penelope his mace and holds her beer.Penelope shatters the crystal which becomes a lot of smaller glowing pieces.

Eugene investigates the three books.The books seem to be possessed.They are a trilogy, "The Books of New Living"and are about how to reanimate bodies.

We look at the plinth.   We recognize four of the six-The Sun, Antheros(the planet), Hasp and Celene(the two moons).   The other two are broken.   Eugene recalls from university days there were some non twinkling stars.  


Martin has a piece that might go on one of the plinths, but can't figure out how they fit. Arada figures it out, and it completes the symbol for Tabit.   Tabit is a maybe star(i.e.planet).Martin mends it just in case .


One of Eugene's books also lists clockworks, and also shows clockwork spiders of many types.And a guardian thingy.


Cogsprocket Sentinel


Cogsprocket spider (are wandering around)

With some divine help, Martin finds Part E. It completes a symbol for Ebla (another planet). As soon as the last plinth was mended, they all moved to a new position.  


Penelope tries to move a plinth. They seem to be locked in place. 


We leave through the north west door, leading to another hallway and shimmering passage.We endp at the southeast door of the main room.  

We try the northeast door.   It leads to another workroom.    

Tick:"Chirp-chirp! O-O-Olivia knows, how to fix, where it goes!"

Tock:"Tock-tock!Sprites play tricks, on the way to Olivia's mix!"

One workbench is different and has an array of ornamental cogs.  There is a plaque on it 


"Five circles tell of time and tower,see what's around, unlock the power.Die casts its fate, a coin does gleam, Cup holds a secret, cards tell a dream."

Penelope recalls there are four elements, four directions, the dice reads four, four cards(tower, flame, cloud, rock), the coin is reflective.   Penelope also notes the symbols could represent the progress of civilization.The fifth circle has an engraving of a clock face.The cup is a wooden cup.Turin recalls water symbolizes life or barrier(like a moat).Penelope pours some water in the cup.Martin puts a watch in the middle.

We try putting the dice, coin, cup, and cards in the four spots.When we turn the cuppside down, we hear a click.   A drawer under the table opens.Inside the drawer is an ornate bronze medallion featuring gears and cogs.We also find a folded piece of paper.  


"To the one whonderstands the rhythm of the cogs and the dance of time, wear this medallion with pride.For you are now a guardian of this tower's legacy.-C.Chronosmith "


Eugene identifies the medallion. It is the Clockworkers Medallion. 


We go through the north door.


We find the forge room.


In the middle of the room is a construct trying to fuel the forge (without success).

Arada approaches the construct.  It goes beep beep.  Arada names him beep beep.


Martin starts aligning the belt. It runs more smoothly. Turin finds something jammed in the gear and tries to pull it free. As it starts running he pulls his fingers free.  Beep beep says beep beep beep. Turin and Martin apply oil and elbow grease to clean the rusty spool.  It also starts turning.


Penelope cleans the grate that is rusted shut. Beep beep opens it.


Beep beep says it needs: 


Ironwood coal, 

Earthheart emerald.

Haven steel 


We will have to go outside the tower to get it. 


We head out the northwest door, which leads to the northwest door of the lobby.


We go to the stairs at the top of the stage.



As we enter the grand hall, and are in an Escher painting of time.


In the middle is a pedestal. Towering above the pedestal is a giant construct. 




The construct slams its staff into the ground and the room shakes.



The construct is angry.  A staff slam injuries all ofs (except Arada) and knocks Eugenenconscious. Martin heals him, and we flee. 


We debate if we should leave and report back, or stay.  Eventually we think we should probably just leave. We end up going back to the inn.

journals.name: This is Halowe ' en, everybody run and scream

text.content:
We levelp overnight

The next morning…

We decide to go finish the doll situation and also go to the Haven Ironworks. We send anrchin to go to Olivia Chronosmith and get him to bring Olivia back to the Griffon. Martin offers 1 silver, 5 copper with a silver after Olivia comes there.


We go to the murder doll house alley. (Haven map O2)

When we get to the alley where the dolls were, the alley is dark and foggy. There is a dead body in the street.  Martin runsp. It appears to be an elven woman. She is wearing ragged clothing and her throat is slit. Her abdomen is also slit open and entrails are spilling out.


Arada sees small doll sized footprints.


We enter.


There are a collection of old toys. A locked chest is in the corner, a ladder leads to an attic.  We get a sense of somethingnfinished.

Penelope starts collecting dolls while Arada inspects the chest. The floornder the chest looksneven. The floornder the chest has been tampered with and is hiding something below. Arada ties the rope around the chest with Mage Hand help. Penelope and Turin drag it out of the corner. Penelope rolls it over to look. 


Arada opens the chest. Inside are more toys and toy parts.


Turin pulls down the ladder. Arada climbs the ladder and looks in. She sees a ton of toys scattered over the floor. And a creepy doll.  She runsp and hits the creepy doll and runs away. The creepy doll follows her down the ladder. The party engages it, but doesn’t quite get it down. It sings, fat lot of good that does.  


Turin goes into the attic. It is full of junk. He roots around a little. Eventually he finds a sizeable mirror, roughly 2x3 feet tall with a fancy frame. The mirror has a curse on it to trap a soul. Once a soul is trapped, you canse it to transfer it to another vessel.  


In the journal, the author talks a bit about his daughter, but nothing about souls. Eugene detects magicnder the floor. It looks like the board might move. Pulling the boards back there is a ladder leading down to a workroom.


Turin goes down. There is a deep sense ofnease. In the center of the room is a broken mirror, with arcane symbols written on the floor. Eugene comes down. The rest ofs follow.


From the shadows, a figure steps forward. It is a life sized doll with delicate figures. Dolls come to life and a malevolent voice says “you abandoned him and lefts all to suffer”

Turin severely damages one of them.  Eugene also magic missiles it.  Penelope thwacks a creepy doll, and Martin makes more light.  Marionette strings grapple Eugene and Turin.


We are a bit spread out, slowly working on the dolls. 


The mirror in the middle of the room flares, and reflections of Turin, Eugene, and Martin come flying out of the mirror. Martin sees a vision of himself as a zombie reaching out and pokes his brain.


The dolls slowly attacks, and we attack back. Turin blasts a significant barrage into the big doll.  Eugeneses magic missile to kill one of the dolls, and to hurt the boss doll.  Martin heals people with the high five line, and the boss moves to attack Turin.


The boss injures Turin, and Arada hurts a doll. Penelope finishes a doll and Martin goes to heal Turin. The mirror flares again, and hurts Martin and Arada.  The mirror hates halflings. It’s racist.


Turin hits the boss, but it does not die, though it seems less solid.  Arada smashes the broken mirror more, but nothing happens. Eugene kills the last creepy doll, leaving only the boss.


Turin rushespstairs to grab the other mirror. Eugene takes it from him and sucks the soul of the boss doll into it.  The foreboding vanishes.

Over breakfast  the next morning the door to the Griffon comes flying open.  A watchman we don’t recognize comes bursting in and says there has been a raid at the tower and we need to come at once.  We tell Porky to let Lyza know we’ve gone to the tower. The watchman says he was at Mint Station and his Sergeant told him to gets.


When we find ourselves outside the tower, where we expect guards, we find none and the door was wide open. It looks like they have been broken open. We enter carefully but confidently. We enter the lobby and see a pile of dead bodies and destroyed clockwork spiders.  The people are all wearing leather armor without tabards. It looks like a band of ruffians. We do a quick search.  Leather armor, cheap weapons, money, black hand patch.  Thesual.  We loot a small amount of coin and Penelope gets 36 pounds of short swords.


Fortunately Tick and Tock are still here.  Also some of the things we repaired seem to be now broken.


We first gop to the Timepiece of Eternity with the guardian. More bodies (moresed swords!), but the Guardian is still around. Eugene flashes the clockworker’s medallion and the guardian seems mollified.  Atop the pedestal in the middle, there is a series of five small circular indentations on the surface. They look like they may hold some type of gemstone. Earthheart emeralds maybe?

In talking to the guardian, it seems to follow Eugene’s basic commands.

We go to the foundry where Beep Beep is, and find …  yep, more bodies.  They look like they have been stacked by Beep Beep. The ingots that Beep Beep made are still there. So we move to the next room…

We go to the room of mirrors where we met the ghost of Gerhart. We recall the ghost wanteds to repair the mirrors.  Martin is pretty sure that Mending won’t be effective. The party discusses asking the mayor if we can borrow a few of the mirrors for the council chambers

In the Assembly Room we find more bodies, which isnusual since nothing was lethal in here before.  

We go to the library and find a few more bodies. It is looking tos like they sent in a bunch of mooks who managed to all die.

We start looking for anyseful books, but find nothing. With nothing else to do, we decide to talk to the mayor and get Olivia.

We make our way back to the watchmakers shop, and Olivia and Seraphina are there. We tell them we are going back to the tower, via the mayor’s office. We explain to the mayor that we need some mirrors to repair the tower.  She also conspicuously avoids any discussion about Swiftsword.

We take a pane of glass across the road to see how it fits.  Sadly we think we will need a glass cutter to make it work. Fortunately Olivia has a glass cutter. Arada tries cutting the glass, which turns out to be a piece of cake. We fix it into one of the mirrors on the floor, and the room seems to brighten ever so slightly.

We repeat the process for all the major mirrors.  Once they are all back in place, the ethereal figure of Constantine forms in the shimmering reflection of the newly restored mirrors. His translucent visage contorts with a mix of relief and despair."Adventurers, "he begins, his voice echoing through the chamber with a hollow resonance, "my Clockwork Tower, a marvel of time and engineering, now stands on the precipice of collapse.I need your aid to right my wrongs."In my zeal and ambition, I left muchndone.As you ascend, you will find my research, incomplete designs, and abandoned constructs.The time control device, my magnum opus, remains unfinished, a testament to my hubris.Seek the blueprint, lost in the maze of gears and pendulums.Only by completing my work can you restore harmony to the tower 's temporal core."Time, while a fascinating subject of study, is unforgiving master.The tower groans and grinds, its once seamless operations marred by decay and neglect.Every jammed door, every grinding gear, is a cry for help."The very heart of the tower flutters erratically, like a bird trapped in a cage.Power surges and wanes, causing rooms to vanish, constructs to go awry, and time itself to warp."His voice grows desperate, "You must find an alternative source of power or stabilize the existing source."He looks at you, hope gleaming in his spectral eyes, "Help me set things right.Restore the Clockwork Tower to its former glory.Only then can I find peace, and the tower continue its journey."

We discuss where the maze might be, and Olivia and Seraphina offer to fix some of the basic stuff.We show them the library and the book inside the glowing force field.Eugene does a perusal of the library to see if there is anything of interest, but find nothing.

Since it is afternoon, we decide to go back to the Griffon, making a brief detour to sell the weapons we looted.Penelope sells the swords and daggers, and gets a total of 194 gold.That' s a lot of beer money.Or ink money in Eugene 's case .We also hire someone to repair the door and get the guards from Noble Station to resume guarding.

Also while we are there, we learn more about the aftermath of Swiftsword./u00a0 The story they heard was that Swiftsword and some of his guard tried to takes down and there are rumors of some very high ranking people who came to helps./u00a0 What we hear is half true, but also some exaggeration./u00a0 One of the big questions is/u201c who is in command now? /u201d Right now, each local Captain is watching their own area, but they are waiting to see what next.

It is clear there is some support fors on the ground, but we don’t know what kind of support Swiftsword had.Eugene also talkies to one of the Noble Station wizards about settingp a"Police Wizarding Best Practices ” committee.They think that is a great idea and offer to setp a meeting.

Back at the Griffon, Porky tellss Lyza is in front of the fire. Thom tells us to keep things calm and quiet.

We talk about Swiftsword and the updates about the Tower.  Between Martin and Eugene we totally keep her calm.

She tellss she went to Swiftsword and got jumped by some of his thugs and we go through the events.

She also tellss Hars left a message fors with Porky.  He says the message is that the long and short of it is that with the gaps in the structure of the city and that some of the powerful groups are looking fors.  And if there is something we could do out of town, we might want to do that.

Wedding or Mine Hunting time!

We throw out the wedding idea, and realize we should leave tomorrow or the day after.  He thinks he can gets some supplies if we can make a list.

Tents

Blankets

Horse blankets

Tarps

Rations 

food for the horses

Mobile kitchen

water/water containers

Wagon repair tools

Basic tools, shovel, axe, hatchet, 50’ of rope

Penelope can talk to contacts if there is a caravan going that way

We also discuss planting false rumors where we are going.

Turin can procure some food on the way via hunting to supplement.

As the crow flies it is 150 miles to Oxgate, which will be 6-8 days with the wagon.

journals.name: Trench Foast is what ' s for breakfast

text.content:
Martin suggests giving them a chance to surrender before we fuck them, knowing they won't take it.



Martin takes the dodge action and steps out and says /u201cGentlemen, and ladies if you are present, we encourage you to surrender, because we really don't want to have to kill anyone else. /u201d


And we start.


Arada runs out and stabs one and retreats. /u00a0 Turin then shoots the other one with sharpshooter and Hunter /u2019s Mark. /u00a0 Eugene tells them to surrender or he'll start blasting.


One tries to attack Marin and misses, so Eugene shoots him.


They close and do some damage, but that just puts them in range.


We trade some damage back and forth, downing one and injuring several.


Trench Foast then has his cue to enter the fray.



Eugene magic missiles to down one and do some major damage against Foast.


We are a bit swarmed, which isn]t good.


Penelope hurts one, but misses another, also doing some damage against Foast.

Martin casts his Spirit Guardians, doing some major damage to all of them, downing one. /u00a0 Another turns to run and Penelope stabs him.Arada causes another to explode.It ' s like they ' ve never heard of Spirit Guardians.


Turin shoots Foast, and Martin's Spirit Guardians finish him off.In the darkness, we hear the sound of /u201cs hit, I'm out of here. /u201d /u00a0 Eugene and Turin chase after him. /u00a0 Martin casts light on Arada so she can chase as well, sing her super speed.


In twelve seconds, Arada gets in front of him and asks /u201cDo you like scary stories ? /u201d


She stabs at him and injures him. /u00a0 Turin shoots and hits the fleeing mystery enemy and Eugene launches a sleep spell knocking him out..Counting Bummy, we have two prisoners.


Meanwhile, Martin searches Trent who has a nice battleaxe.He's wearing studded leather, has a dagger, and 25 gp. /u00a0 We loot the rest, and get their gear but find no orders.We bundle the swords together so Penelope can carry them.


Martin does the high five line, finishing off his spellcasting for the night.



We decide to camp for the night inside Eugene's Tiny Hut, securing the two prisoners.


Eugene takes the first watch, and hears an animal prowling outside, just on the edge of his vision.Martin steps out and tosses a light pebble in the direction of the wolf.It charges Martin and bites him. /u00a0 Martin returns to the hut.


The wolf looks like it is going to bite the prisoners, and suddenly looksp and east. /u00a0 Martin wakesp Turin who asks him to lightp an arrow.


Turin steps out, and shoots the light arrow to the distance and steps back.The arrow light reveals anicorn. /u00a0 Overall, nicorns are considered good creatures, but this one remindss of thendead, half rottennicorn that we saw a couple months ago. /u00a0 This would be the third time we've seen it.


Martin wakes Arada and Penelopep.


The wolf looks angry and threatened. /u00a0 Out of frustration it takes a bite out of one of the prisoners, and bounds off into the distance. /u00a0 Thenicorn doesn't like standing in the light, and moves into the darkness.


Eugene, Martin and Arada notice it has moved to the west. /u00a0 Martin sticks his head out and says /u201cParlez vous neigh ? /u201d /u00a0 It does look like anndead intelligent animal. /u00a0


We know thatndead things exist, butsually aren't near builtp areas. /u00a0ndead animals are rare though, and Eugene has never heard a reference to anndeadnicorn.


The rest of the night passesneventfully.
