We check to see who died. /u00a0 It wasn't Bummy who is a littlepset we didn't save him. /u00a0 Eugene points out that in a way, we did.


Martin checks the cave to see if the bodies there have been disturbed. /u00a0 They haven't been.


We decide to head back to town, Bummy in tow.

journals.name: s and Julio Down by the New Guards

text.content:
It is early morning.We are patrolling near the city guard armory, near the academy.We pass by and Julio is no longer outside on guard.We peek inside, there are carts which would be loaded, but no Julio."On the wall is a black handprint".Arada remembers that six months ago the HQ of the Thieves Guild was burned.Many(stupid)people thing the thieves guild is no more.The people in the know think a rival guild "The Black Hand"is involved in a turf war.

Arada sees something moving to the south side of the main store room.It looks like a giant bug rummaging through boxes.The crates are open and there is some rusty metal near one of them.It attacks Penelope and misses.Martinses magic(and needs to remember order of operations).Eugene put it to sleep and Penelope and Arada smushed it.

And we found another one.Yay.Arada hits it with her crossbow straight through the /u2026 cloaca maybe ? Eugene finished it with a magic missile.And there is a third.Penelope disengages and Arada shoots it.Eugene hits it with fire.Turing shoots it and Martin sacred flames it.It tries to rust Penelope ' s armor and hit her.More fire, and Turin kills it.

There is some munched metal, but we stopped most of it.There is nothing obvious about how they got in.

Martin goes to get reinforcements.We roust the Sergeant and the Captain.

A civilian says she say some shifty men who attacked the guard and had a horse and cart.Her husband thinks it may have been the work of the Shadow Rats, who are a small group of petty criminals.He ' s heard a rumor of a new crime boss who is organizing the small gangs into a big gang.He mentions a yellow bearded wizard.Sounds like our Enigma friend.

Martin suggests getting someone to alert the nearest guards barracks and to ask the trolleys if they have seen anything.

We head towards Market Barracks. @ UID[JournalEntry.4pk1PyuDgUzhhqwZ]{Lucille} is on duty.We fill her in on what happens.We offer to let her be a local to helpp.She comes withs and suggests to start at the Rat Statue(P03).We make our way to a dingy little alley way where the statue is(the Bronze Rat Memorial).We hear a door close behinds and someone went running.We lost them.

We go back to look through the house they came out of.The house is abandoned, but also has beensed.The footprints go throughout.Aradanlocks a door leading to stairs down.We search andpstairs we find the tortured body of Julio.Arada is mad.Martin is really pissed off.

We went down in the basement and Penelope sneakily discovered a mimic.It chomps her.She swings back.Martin, Turin, and Penelope are down there and join in.Lucille and Eugene rush downstairs.We make quick work of the mimic.In the remains of the mimic, we find a chewedp body of a man with a yellow beard.In the room, we discover a pair of gauntlets and a stack of papers.And some really weird bones.

The runes on the ground look like a summoning circle.Maybe this is where the rust monsters came from ?

Turin reads the papers(in elvish).It iooks like someone what hired by someone referred to as "The Nameless"to disrupt the City Watch.Whomever it was was trying to summon rust monsters.Also a kobold, mephit, and a quasit.

We secure the crime scene.

On our way back home, we meet a man who is concerned and wants to talk tos.He is acting on behalf of an employer looking to perform a little task.Nothing illegal, but from members of the guard.If we wish to pursue the matter, we can meet on God ' s Day the 25th at 9pm at Dhum ' s Rooms.

We take stock of what we know.


  • The fabric store is sketch and has more money than it should

  • The tower defense book is in one of the shop

  • We are looking for the girls

  • Lyza askeds to check in before we do something rash



We get Eugene to try messaging a bit more to see if we can get a bead on the girls. /u00a0 At some point he gets a response.In the basement of the clothing shop


/u201cWho is this ? /u201d /u201cEugene /u201d


/u201cWe're trapped in cages /u201d

/u201cAt least three prisoners, and I can hear two other voices /u201d


Eugene promises to try to affect a rescue as soon as we can.He also try - ingle - eightssing his message to determine they arender the street.


We discuss how to help them.Eugene tellss they are in the basement of Silks and Fabrics.Eugene, Arada, and Turin are going to stay behind and keep an eye on things, and Martin and Penelope are going to let Lyza know what isp.


Martin and Penelope tell Lyza we found the girls and where they are.She tellss the store is owned by Adrielle Ilorim who is from a relatively well off but quiet family. /u00a0 They are minor elven nobility.


Lyza tellss to go back and she will joins in an hour.She orderss to not do anythingntil she is there. /u00a0 She and Martin discuss the possible circumstances that we might decide to do something.


Meanwhile Arada looks to do a walk around and to see if she can climbp to the roof without being noticed.Turin looks to see if there is a secret access from the green space, but finds nothing.Eugene narrows the search a bit tighter.


On the roofs, Arada explores.The roof is lightly pitched.She finds a good hiding spot to keep an eye on what is going on.She notices that part of the roof is about two feet taller in the front than in back.On the backside, there are a couple of windows.A quick peek suggests it is a workroom with four people in it. /u00a0 Two in the far corner are sewing, two others at different stations.


Eugeneses his augury spell to get an indication if it will be a good idea to enter Silks and Fabrics tose their basement to get to our friends, (Is it weal or wot to enter Fine Silks and Fabrics tose its basement to access our caged friends located within 90 ' south of me)but the spell is inconclusive.Turin goes to the river' s edge to look around.He sees no obvious opening, sewer or otherwise.


Martin and Penelope return.  We let Turin and Eugene know Lyza has tolds to wait for an hour. Arada moves to the top of the building and tosses an iron spike to get our attention. Penelope notices Arada on the top of the roof. 


Eugene also confirms that Olivia and Marita are also down there. Martin casts light on a couple rocks so there can be light in the basement. Eugene lets Arada know we are waiting for Lyza. Arada has one more peek at the seamstresses to confirm they don’t look like they are there against their will. At some point checking in with Eugene, she letss all know.


It has been an hour and still no Lyza. Eugene tries another augury knowing there is a good chance it might fail. It says we need to go through the store.


Martin suggests we go in, get the girls to make a distraction and yell and we “hear” them. Arada suggests she lures them out.  


The plan is for Arada to go in the window, Turin and Martin to go in the back door, and Eugene and Penelope to go in the front. Eugene givess a one minute warning. 


Eugene gives the go sign. Arada bursts in and runs downstairs. Turin and Martin search the back room.  Penelope tries to buy a dress. Something she can wear to a wedding.  With a sword belt.


Arada and Turin search and find nothing. Penelope finds a lovely dark green fabric that would looks great with her hair. The clerks are confused. Martin explains to a clerk that we’re doing something rash. 


Eugene talks to another clerk asking where the basement is. A clerk really wants to get Penelope into the change room and out of her armor. Really wants this. She’s totally into Penelope. Penelope disagrees.


Turin realizes the change room is a good place to hide a secret door. Martin runs into the change room and something sounds odd with the floor. 


Eugene runspstairs and casts Detect Thoughts. He gleans a sense of fear that we’ve found out. He shouts that he’s found someone who knows something. Arada runspstairs. Thepstairs folk are confused (except for mistress)


Turin senses there is a hollow in the floornder the carpet. He pullsp the carpet and finds a trap door. He opens itp and goes. Penelope yells that we found a door so hopefully Arada and Eugene hear and also goes to the changeroom. The horny clerk gives a look of “that’s what I was trying to let you know”


Eugene tells Arada that Mistress is guilty and involved. As he interrogates her, she seems confused about the abducted girls.  He pushes deeper into her mind and finds she is involved in kidnapping people, but is confused about the prisoners downstairs. Arada tells Mistress she isnder arrest.  Mistress fails to be intimidated. Eugene confirms that Mistress is Adrielle Ilorim.

In the basement we come to a room with a desk and some cages. Arada sees a bad guy and fires an arrow. Eugene informs the bad guys that they arender arrest and resistance will be met with lethal force.

Martin gives Turin and Penelope an emboldening bond and shouts that we’re here to do something rash.

Turin splats the bandit who tickled Eugene.  The bandit captain attacks Eugene. Penelope does a lot of damage to the bandit captain who is questioning the choices that brought him here. Arada misses while Eugene magic missiles him. Martin does one point of sacred flame asking him to dos a solid and surrender. Turin’s magic arrow trick does more damage.

More bandits arrive. Yay target rich environment.

Penelope turns into a whirling dervish and hurts the bandit captain badly and Arada finishes him off. We start working on the other bandits. 

They try to hit Arada with their crossbows and miss. Martin tries to convince them to givep.  It appears to work on one of them. Turin kills one of the bandits who seems to still be active. Penelope splats the other. Arada kills the last guy, somewhat to Martin’s chagrin.

journals.name: We have to go back Martin ...

text.content:
…  It is late in the day on the 15th.  The sun is well on its way to closing, the main portion of the gate is closed.  As we approach the city, a few hundred yards away.  We feel a tremendous lurch.  Everybody except Penelope is bent over lurching, our heads pounding.  Turin’s horse throws him to the ground. The cart horse falls to the ground,nable to getp.  


After a couple minutes, the pain starts to ease, our stomachs empty. We look around, and think we are in the same place at the same time. We look at the animals.


Eugene looks at the contents of the cart to see if there is evidence of time passage. There isn’t.


A little out from the gate there are two women, one tall and one short.  The short one has her hands on her hips. As we get closer, the tall one is Lucille, and the short one is Jillie. Lucille was sent by Lyza to watch fors.  


Jillie is pissed off.  We’ve been gone for 4 weeks.  She thinks we’ve abandoned our post. Martin is flummoxed.

journals.name: We' re off to see a wizard

text.content:
< March 5, 2025 >

Lyza still hasn’t come back. We’re sure she is fine.

We head to the Ironworks to meet with Dahlia. We ask for two bars and a couple bags of coal. At least as a reasonable start.  We bring Seraphina withs.

We arrive at Olivia’s and the note is still there. Eugene gives Seraphina a bag of clockwork dog parts to keep her busy, while we head to try to find the junkyard. Seraphina is going to the tower to wait fors there. 

We head to the junkyard. There is a fence and gate, but it is a giant yard of mechanical and rusted junk. It is supposed to be garbage, but it seems different. Turin wanders off and encounters a ghosty rusty humanoid thing.

It almost seems to Turin that it is trying to fix something. Turin calls out to it, but it does not respond. The rest ofs catchp. The rust engineer reaches out to touch Penelope. It hurts.

Turin shoots it and does serious damage. Arada makes it go splat. 

We explore some more and see another one. Turin shoots it and in response it charges Turin but misses. Martin rushesp and sees annconscious Olivia. He sends a Healing Word at her. She is alive butnconscious.

Meanwhile Eugene finds some clock parts. Penelope also finds a spring. Penelope and Turin help Olivia to her feet. She remarks how both are big and strong.

Eugene ritually casts detect magic. There is faint magic all around, probably chronology.

The night passesneventfully.

The mine has a wide entrance with a palisade built across and an iron door in it.A set of cart tracks leadsnder the door.   There is an obvious transfer point outside, and it is overall well travelled.

sing the key from whatshisface, we open the door and step inside.   Immediately inside, there is a cart with a bunch of boxes.It appears to have iron or coal.We take the right passage.

In an open area we see some small beastlike monsters.

Arada rushesp and stabs one.Between Eugene, Penelope, and Turin they finish off the demon kitties with haste.It looks to be a break room.


Further on there is another mine cart that looks dusty.We carry on and discover a dense thicket of thorny brambles blocking the passages for 15 feet or so. /u00a0 Martin takes a cutting.


Along another passage we find the body of presumably a miner.There is very little flesh left.Arada discovers another, very large mine beast. /u00a0


Turin attacks it twice doing considerable damage.It moves around the corner because it is too large to squeeze through the opening.We get a couple hits in before it can engage.It bites Arada seriously harming her before Penelope can finish it off.


A bit further on there is a set of stairs that have been partly blocked by a rockslide.We carefully clamber down.We find a small lake with a boat as well as a fishing spot.Across the water we hear some rustling and gnawing. /u00a0


We have Penelope, Arada, and Martin take the boat across, and we tie a rope to the boat so Turin and Eugene can pull it back.Across the river we see a swarm of spiders.Fortunately the melee people are close and the range are in the back.With a little effort we dispatch them.Mama showsp.

Mama dies.


nderneath all the spiderweb and eggs and such, Arada sees a vein of ore with what might be gold. /u00a0 Eugene carefully burns the web and takes a little of the gold.Unfortunately this is otherwise a dead end.


We come to a small cliff with a lake.We drop a lit rock in and see that it is very, very deep. Bored, Penelope explores and hears some strange growling and scraping noises to the southeast.We go investigate.


There are cobwebs over an old rockslide.We climbp and see three of the smaller beasts.

Penelope kills two and Turin finishes the last.As we reach the top it looks like the remains of a one person campsite.Searching the campsite reveals a gruesomely dismembered corpse that has been ripped apart.


There is the remains of a cage and whatever was inside the cage has burst out.There is a book which appears to be a bestiary that Eugene can't read.Towards the back are some notes.Eugeneses comprehend language to read it. /u00a0


I met someone hidden in shadows in the Farwater Inn in the middle of town.Was offered 50 gold pieces plus ten percent.The person was /u2026

One entry looks like one of the critters we killed called a mine demon and its young look like the smaller ones.

Turin does some scouting and finds a couple places we haven't searched.We also find a backpack with rope, 50 gold coins, and some nice boots.We also find a receipt for 50 gold marked /u201cT /u201d

We find a narrow mine tunnel ending in an ancient rockslide and another narrow tunnel that has been mined out. /u00a0

As we climbp a small tunnel, we feel the ground rumble.Along the wall to the north we see a bunch of rubble come down along the length.There appears to be a doorway. /u00a0

There appears to be a rough hewn hallway going down 20 to 30 feet going downward.Arada goes to explore.As she has gone down 20 or so feet, she notices from one side of the passageway is a small stream.She whistless down.



This looks like a worked cave section that someone has put some work into.


The area is lit by a weird greenish glow. /u00a0


Along one passage, Arada finds a glowing green rock.If we knew what Earthheart Emeralds look like, this might be it.Meh, probably good enough.


Exploring for the monster, we find a monster.Daisy ?


We barely damage it and it attacks Arada and misses.It stops momentarily buildingp pressure, shaking the cavern.Arada starts climbing on it, and Turin does a major hit.Eugene webs it, and it spends its turn breaking free breaks.The cavern shakes again, knocking most ofs down before Penelope kills it.Eugene takes spare parts.


Down a hall we see a glow to the south.We come to a small room with a ladderp to a ledge with another glowing rock. /u00a0 /u00a0


Eugene finds a room with a floor made of crushed bones and another rock.We find these rocks all over the place.


And we find another one of the clockwork monsters.It swings and hits Penelope.Martin sacred flames it, and Turin hurts it.Eventually Penelope kills it off in a manner too epic to describe.


We keep finding crystals and get to another monster.This one seems harder to take down, either that or the luck has not been as withs. /u00a0 We kill it and take a short rest in Eugene's hut.
